name: The Velos Klick - 1km Challenge
description: A klick is a military term for a distance of 1km, and so Team Velos brings you a challenge to complete 1km in the fastest time possible. We will change courses monthly (all Flat courses) and we will have winners from each category at the end of the month. Choose your bike very carefully as it could make all the difference, the challenge is available every night during the week use it as a warm up for a race or just use it to improve your 1km time or power figures, whatever just have fun.

name: The WarmUp Ride
description:
From humble beginnings on Melbourne's Mornington Peninsula, ZMCC has grown to become a favourite hangout within the Zwiftverse. Whether you're looking to push yourself, recover or just spin around - ZMCC is always there for you. Bad dad jokes and questionable banter are just extras you can't buy.

We make the following promises:

We won't yell at the flyers - let them live their imaginary life.
We won't wait for stragglers - we can't help poor event choices or tech issues.
We won't bore or tease you with pretend drinks or snacks.

Join us. Enjoy. You're welcome.

Like and join us on Facebook at https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftmelbournecyclingclub

name: NPRC - Run Every Day Powered By NoblePro
description:
Come and join the fastest growing running club on Zwift.  With a choice of 5 or 10k you can pick your distance. Whether you are a beginner or experienced runner come and join us, you can run at whatever pace you like, it’s not a race unless you want it to be!

Each day is a different route and as new routes are released the courses will change to allow you to bag that badge.

You will run in our in game NPRC jersey and if you complete the event you get to keep it to wear wherever you like.

We also hold special events where you can win an actual jersey to wear in real life.

NPRC Facebook – We have a facebook group where you can join and talk about all things running.  Share your stories and get help and advice.

https://www.facebook.com/groups/1223724692417314/

NoblePro: - We are a team focused on elevating running through our treadmills and digital platforms. We create treadmills loved by runners and the wider running community for quality engineered hardware features and advanced software integration to give you the freedom to train with the apps you love.
https://www.noble-pro.com/

Kinni:- In a fitness world where treadmill bluetooth integration can be a confusing place, we aim to provide you with the ability to effortlessly connect. You can run structured treadmill workouts, connect and integrate with your favourite bluetooth fitness apps such as Zwift, Rouvy, Kinomaps and many more. We are focused on progress and advancement in integration, connectivity and control.
https://kinni.co/https://kinni.co/devices/ - To see if your treadmill is compatible to link to Zwift.

Join the NoblePro Running Club (NPRC) - https://www.zwift.com/clubs/e7829ccd-bce4-4244-9ccf-4cdc3ef148ff/home

eventSubgroups.name: NPRC - Run Every Day Powered By NoblePro (A)
NPRC - Run Every Day Powered By NoblePro (B)

name: Rhino Racing Short Crits
description:
Fast and fun criterium races with five race times every Tuesday, Thursday, Friday, and Saturday.
A power meter or smart trainer is required for entry. A ZwiftPower account is required to be counted in the official results.
View the calendar of all Rhino Racing events: https://www.zwift.com/uk/events/tag/rhinoracing
Do you enjoy these events? We want to hear from you. Share your feedback on the Rhino Racing Discord.
Interested in team racing? We do ZRL, Dirt Racing Series, Club Ladder, and WTRL TTT events. Join us! https://discord.com/invite/wPD4HJ6

name: Workout 1 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 1: Foundations
This workout reinforces “calm control” with mostly steady work, then finishes by sharpening leg speed so you can stay smooth at any cadence.

name: JETT Hill Climb & Interval Ride
description:
Welcome to Japan eSports Tempting Team's Hill Climb & Interval  training!

１．The signal is on Leader's [Go].
Be sure to stay behind the leader just before the sprint & KOM.
Immediately after the sprint & Climb , please make efforts to re-group immediately (1.0w/kg at the head and 2.0 to 2.5w/kg at the back). 
Since we want to return to base pace immediately after re-grouping, your cooperation with Regroup is essential.

２．Interval Training is ... Hard time: 3.5 w / kg to 6.0 w / kg ··· 2 minutes to 5 minutes
Follow the leader's power instructions and enjoy interval training.

In addition, mini races are also planned in the final stage!
Start is on my 'go'
Be sure to stay behind the leader before you start.

Ride On !!

* Please note that if you lead with abnormal speed, flag will be set.

Hill Climb Training!
SprintとIntervalを組み合わせてトレーニングを実施しますします。

１．スプリント& KOMの合図は、私の 【 Go 】です。
スプリン& KOM直前は、必ずリーダーの後ろにいてください。
スプリント&KOM直後は、すぐにリグループするよう努力してください(先頭は1.0w/kg、後方は2.0〜2.5w/kg)。リグループ後すぐに、ベースペースへ戻したいため、リグループへの皆さんのご協力は、不可欠です。
２．インターバルトレーニングは，ハードタイム：3.5w/kg~6.0w/kg・・・2分～5分
リーダーのパワー指示に従い，インターバルトレーニングを楽しみましょう。
なお、終盤にミニレースも予定してます！！
スタートは，リーダーの「GO」が合図です。スタート前に必ずリーダーの後ろにいてください。
Ride On !!

※異常なスピードでリードした場合、フラグを立てますのでご注意下さい。

#jett #japan

name: Stage 1: Pas Racing: Jungle Circuit
description:
The PAS Racing Gravel Series brings the spirit and style of Pas Normal Studios to gravel racing on Zwift. Across four stages, you’ll take on demanding routes in a series designed to be raced flat out. Get a shiny new gravel bike from the Drop Shop and let it rip!

Complete any stage to win a brand new Pas Normal Jersey!

Badges are out—XP is in. Every finish fuels your progress. Earn up to 2000 XP for completing the series, including a massive 1000 XP from Stage One.

Stage 1
Route: Jungle Circuit
Date: April 6–12

The series kicks off on the Jungle Circuit in Watopia.. Line up, find your rhythm, and open the PAS Racing Series strong.

Stage 2
Route: Handful of Gravel
Date: April 13–19

The challenge builds. Handful of Gravel rewards the right setup and steady power across demanding terrain. Upgrade your build, join the next start line, and keep the momentum rolling.

Stage 3
Route: Yumezi Grit
Date: April 20–26

A brand new gravel racing route on Zwift. Fresh terrain. New lines to chase. Take on Yumezi Grit, test yourself against the field, and experience competitive gravel at its best.

Stage 4
Route: Serpentine 8
Date: April 27 – May 3

One final chance to line up and close out the PAS Racing Series. Hard routes. Real racing. Finish it strong.

MONTHLY GC COMPETITION

Looking for extra motivation? The Monthly GC (General Classification) Competition lets you track your progress across all stages. Each race counts—your times add up throughout the series, shaping the overall standings. At the end of the month, the fastest total time takes the win!
VIEW RESULTS: https://www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/pasracing2026

—------------------

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that in order to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

name: AHDR FAB Rolls p/b JetBlack
description:
The weekend is upon us, so you know what that means - no Bacon Rolls! The time has come for the AHDR Full Aussie Brekkie Roll! Just like your favorite weekday morning treat, but bigger and better for Saturday morning. The kitchen opens at 0615 but be early as the “Full” sign goes up after 30 minutes. The buffet will cover longer courses with rolling terrain at a brisk endurance pace to satisfy your weekend craving. The kitchen will close after 2 hours but those who still have leftovers will have time to finish their course. The fence will be on, but the blob will rule the road. We will ride at around 2.5-3.0W/kg but will adjust this to the group as necessary. Please stay together as a group around the Beacon. It is a steady endurance ride, not a race. All are welcome - join us for as long as you want.

#ahdr

name: Fast Friday Workout
description:
Congratulations, you crushed another week of workouts! If you’re looking to cap off a great week with another can't-miss training session, check out Fast Friday on Zwift. 

A new workout series to put in your weekly run rotation, Fast Friday is a simple and streamlined way to get your heart rate up. We’re focusing on short reps here, clocking in fast intervals that help runners increase their top speed. Short. Sharp. Fast. High-intensity intervals are proven to take your performance to the next level. So lace up and get moving for just 20–30 minutes every Friday before checking out of the office and into the weekend. 

#fastfriday

name: SROZ's The Lone Wolf Chrono
description:
Welcome to SROZ's Lone Wolf Chrono! This isn't about sitting in the wheels or playing tactics in the pack. This is a pure test of grit, pacing, and individual strength. Whether you are chasing a new Personal Best or just want to see where your fitness stands, this is your chance to empty the tank against the clock.

The Mission: One rider. One bike. Total focus.

Please ensure your weight and height are up to date. Heart Rate Monitors are required for podium contenders.

name: Stage 4 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!


Stage 4
Route: Sand and Sequoias
Date: April 6-12

Wrap up the Zwift Big Spin down on Sand and Sequoias, with loads of prizes still on deck!

name: The Saturday Shop Ride by Trek Australia
description:
Complete this ride to unlock the Trek Segafredo Training kit!

In March 2020 we turned the legendary Trek Melbourne Shop Rides into a Zwift event for "just a few weeks..." four years later we have an amazing global community who meet up every Saturday for all the banter, coffee, fast and slow fun of a social shop ride. We stop twice to regroup along the way to keep it social, and our leaders and sweepers ensure everyone who wants to can get to the end. And if 70.02km is too short, you can even stay on for some TrekStras!

If you're looking for a supportive community bunch ride, or even your first ride on Zwift this is the perfect place to Ride Bikes, Have Fun and Feel Good!

Check out our club Trek Australia New Zealand Ride Club to stay in the loop.

name: Ride Energizer JZQc
description:
Ride énergique du vendredi,pour ceux qui veulent apprendre à bien rouler en peloton dans Zwift.
Vitesse 1,5w/kg à 1,9w/kg
La barrière "Fence" est activée et aussi le mode "Kick-Out" pour ceux qui resteront trop longtemps en avant de la barrière !

Page Facebook JZQc :https://www.facebook.com/groups/146565219300844Opens a new window
Serveur Discord JZQc : https://discord.gg/3sxk5ZDOpens a new window (canal vocal CycloPlus)

Instagram:jzqc_

name: TBR 101 - Endurance
description:
The aim of TBR 101 is to help riders achieve a century (100 km) at a nice, chilled pack pace of around 36 kmh. Many riders think that they might never get to wear the Zwift Metric Century jersey – yet by sitting in our pack, with a group of experienced riders to assist, this is achievable. We try to be friendly, encouraging and concentrate on the core group around the beacon. If you wish to average faster than 36 kmh we suggest you look at other events such as Asia 120 that commences 2 hours after TBR 101. We have lots of laughs and banter – all helping to pass the time. We don't use the fence for this ride as we believe all riders should exercise self-control and respect the ride leader by riding with the yellow beacon at all times. Your co-operation helps us provide everyone with a fun, supportive and inclusive ride. Follow TBR at thebigring.cc to learn more about our events, read ride reports and leave feedback. Spotify https://open.spotify.com/playlist/4SKGVF1M70ccToY7RA82eR?si=9nX9SZZoRW-48dEPM59riw

#TBR

name: Workout 1 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 1: Foundations
This workout reinforces “calm control” with mostly steady work, then finishes by sharpening leg speed so you can stay smooth at any cadence.

name: Workout 5: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp
description:
The Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp is where the pros put in the work, and this year, you’re invited to join them. Across five weeks of structured training, plus a make-up week, you’ll ride alongside the team on Zwift—sprinting with Jasper Philipsen and Kaden Groves, building endurance with Mathieu van der Poel, and learning from head coach Kristof De Kegel. Don't miss your chance to be a part of the structure, science, and team energy that fuels the WorldTour.

Workout 5: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp

This final session brings it all together. Two long tempo efforts build strong, sustainable endurance and reward the work you’ve done. Settle into a steady rhythm, stay composed, and finish the Alpecin–Premier Tech Training Camp strong!

name: Restart Esports - Happy Hour
description:
Restart Esports - instagram.com/restart.esports

1. Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) is mandatory for all participants.

2. Power Source is Mandatory for all racers. A smart trainer or smart bike should be your power source where possible. ZPower is not allowed. 

3. Dual Recording - Should always be done if you have the capability. All podium positions are expected to dual record or have at least have a recent dual recording history on their profile. Any rider posting high level performances is expected to validate their hardware with dual recordings as a minimum. 

Results WILL be amended (if required), in the interest of fair play, for all Restart Esports hosted events.

eventSubgroups.name: Restart Esports - Happy Hour (A)
eventSubgroups.description:
Join in on a new weekly race: the Restart Racing Sunday Classic.

Restart Racing is an eRacing team that likes to race hard and have fun. eSports gives us an amazing platform to better ourselves as bike racers and is a great way to make friends and enjoy ourselves. 

Each week will feature a different course ranging in distance from 50-70kms with a target finish time of around 1.5hrs. Please use ZwiftPower's Minimum Category on your profile for race entry.

Cats A & B riders require a power source (power meter or smart trainer) plus a heart rate monitor. Podium finishers in Cat A are expected to dual record and make analysis 'Public' on Zwift Power while using a direct drive trainer and power meter.
Cat C will require a power source (power meter or smart trainer) and a heart rate monitor for podium spots.

Cat A - 4.0+ (min 250W)
Cat B - 3.2 - 4.0 w/kg (min 200W)
Cat C - 2.5 - 3.2 w/kg (min 150W)
Cat D - 1.0 - 2.5 w/kg

name: RO4H Weekend Wander
description:
Welcome to the RO4H Weekend Wander.

The RO4H Weekend Wander is a social group ride hosted by the Ride On 4 Health community, where a friendly, casual, supportive, and respectful atmosphere embraces everyone from the most seasoned Zwifter to the first-time group ride participant.

This ride uses Zwift’s “Keep Everyone Together” (Rubberbanding) feature. Rubberbanding keeps everyone in the group together by adjusting in-game speed so riders of different power levels stay together. Your actual watts are still recorded, but speed and segment times won’t reflect normal in-game physics. Just ride at a comfortable effort and enjoy staying with the group from start to finish.

So come along for the RO4H Weekend Wander — you'll almost certainly break a sweat, undoubtedly hear a few dad jokes, and might even have some fun.

description: Betty Designs Down Under is a Saturday cruise of Watopia.  We all love to race but the Betty Designs Down Under ride is for looking stylish and cruising Watopia with friends. description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. name: The QueenBee Weekender
description:
Join the QueenBee Ladies Weekender group ride to kickstart your weekend the right way. The Weekender is a ‘change up’ ride format, where each week will be a new adventure; social cruises, badge hunts, elevation gains, flats, workouts and more… 
Each ride is banded, therefore no matter how hard you personally want to work, everyone stays together! 

The QueenBees are a group of women who share a love of cycling. Just as a hive works together to bring out the best in every member of the community, so do we. We strive to support, empower and encourage women to live their best lives, no matter where they are on their life, cycling or fitness journey. 

Join our QueenBee hive here (ladies only):

name: Bikealicious Jitenshaninoru
description:
We are a friendly gathering of cycling enthusiasts. We ride for 90 minutes, and for no less than 20 miles. We ride a new route “Every Saturday morning 7a.m. (GMT +9)” to keep the workout fresh and fun for all the zwifters. We ride with a rubber band to motivate all skill sets to stay together through challenging climbs resulting in an interactive and dynamic workout. Our group includes riders of all power levels. We welcome all riders.

私たちはサイクリング愛好家の友好的な集まりです。私たちは90分間、20マイル以上の距離を走ります。すべてのzwifterのワークアウトを新鮮で楽しいものに保つために、新しいルート「毎週土曜日の午前7時（GMT+9） 」に乗ります。私たちは輪ゴムを使って乗り、すべてのスキルセットが挑戦的な登りで一緒にいるように動機付け、インタラクティブでダイナミックなトレーニングを実現します。私たちのグループには、すべてのパワーレベルのライダーが含まれます。すべてのライダーを歓迎します。

description:
ZWIFT RACING LEAGUE RECON RIDE

Ya es un clásico de los viernes juntarnos aquí, entrenando juntos y sumando amigos a la gran comunidad de Zwift. Sabes que podes entrenar con nosotros usando la mejor ropa de ciclismo de Argentina. No dudes en visitar:

name: ZTBR - Training Stabilization TTT
description:
Zwift Teams Brazil [ZTBR] together with Assessoria Franklin Almeida, provides this training with a focus on providing better "Stabilization" in the performance of athletes seeking better performance in Team Time Trial (TTT) events.

This training aims to help the athlete tolerate and withstand an accumulation of substrates produced by the body in sub-maximal activities, bringing more stability and control in time-based tests.

Franklin Almeida Consulting was created in 2005, with the aim of evaluating the physiological profile, developing training to improve your physical capacity, health and maximum performance.
One of the pioneers in distance consulting in Brazil!

Note: We will have other phases of this training in addition to Stabilization, they are: (Training for FTP Gains and Terrain Variations).

===
Português:
Treino de Estabilização by Franklin Almeida

Descrição: O Zwift Teams Brazil [ZTBR] juntamente com a Assessoria Franklin Almeida, disponibiliza este treino com foco em proporcionar melhor "Estabilização" na performance de atletas que buscam um melhor desempenho nos eventos tipo Team Time Trial (TTT).

Esse treino tem o objetivo de ajudar o atleta a tolerar e suportar um acúmulo de sustratos produzidos pelo organismo em atividades sub máximas trazendo mais estabilidade e controle em provas de conta relógio.

A Consultoria Franklin Almeida foi criada em 2005, com o objetivo de avaliar o perfil fisiológico, desenvolver treinos para melhorar sua capacidade física, sua saúde e desempenho máximo.
Um dos pioneiros em consultoria a distância no Brasil!

Obs.: Teremos outras fases deste treinamento além da Estabilização, são elas: (Treino para Ganhos de FTP e Variações de terreno).

name: Workout 1 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 1: Foundations
This workout reinforces “calm control” with mostly steady work, then finishes by sharpening leg speed so you can stay smooth at any cadence.

name: Fast Friday Workout
description:
Congratulations, you crushed another week of workouts! If you’re looking to cap off a great week with another can't-miss training session, check out Fast Friday on Zwift. 

A new workout series to put in your weekly run rotation, Fast Friday is a simple and streamlined way to get your heart rate up. We’re focusing on short reps here, clocking in fast intervals that help runners increase their top speed. Short. Sharp. Fast. High-intensity intervals are proven to take your performance to the next level. So lace up and get moving for just 20–30 minutes every Friday before checking out of the office and into the weekend. 

#fastfriday

name: Zwift Crit Racing Club - Glasgow Reverse
description:
It's Crit time! Come and join in the fun on a number of multi-lap short routes. Get ready to dig deep and push to the finish line!

What is Racing Score?

Racing Score is an intuitive system that replaces the traditional categories (A - D) with a 0-1000 scale to reflect your current level, considering various metrics like race performances and power. This score helps Zwift recommend the most competitive band to race in, ensuring a fun, rewarding, and exciting experience as you track your progression throughout your Zwift racing adventures.

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

description: If you are looking for a fun ride before the weekend come and join the Giant team for 60 min we’ll be rolling at a great pace 2.2 w/kg to 2.6 w/kg with some history questions and trivia quizzes or other things depending on the weather ☀️ the ride leader will try to keep the group together and also kindly respect the pace and stay close to the yellow leader, last 5 min will be an optional race to win the croissant 🥐  thank you!

name: Zwift Racing League Recon Ride (ZTBR)
description:
This ZRL Group Recon Ride is led by ZTBR (https://www.zwift.com/clubs/661d2b21-0b2d-433b-8c61-baba4a0c256e).

Zwift Racing League Group Recon Rides are the official non-competitive Group Rides. Each one is hosted/run by a participating club and will feature racing tips and tricks for the race ahead, an opportunity to ask questions relating to Zwift Racing League and to preview the full course for Tuesday’s ZRL races.

THE AIM
With experienced ride leaders and Zwifters from a reputable Zwift Club, this is your opportunity to ask questions about all things ZRL-related. You'll be able to learn useful course and team tactics and if you are new to ZRL - perhaps even find a team to race with too!

There are multiple Group Recon Rides to choose from each day at various times and each will operate at the advertised paces (pace is based on your Zwift Pace Group).

WHAT IS THE ZRL?
Introducing the spectacular Zwift Racing League (ZRL) - a turbocharged online bike racing extravaganza that's rewriting the rules of competition. With a staggering 180 community divisions, 1,800 electrifying teams, and a whopping 14,000 fierce racers per 6-week round, the ZRL stands as the undisputed heavyweight champion of online bike racing competitions worldwide.

This high-octane spectacle is masterfully orchestrated by our powerhouse partners, WTRL, who leave no stone unturned in delivering an unparalleled racing experience. But remember, this race is an invitation-only affair, so if you dare to join the ranks of speed demons and thrill-seekers, you'll need to hitch a ride with one of the esteemed existing teams. Fear not, though, for WTRL's website (www.WTRL.racing) is your portal to all the insider intel - schedule, rules, and even a team that perfectly aligns with your fiery spirit!

If you want to gather your own team, you register for the next Round of ZRL at www.wtrl.racing/zwift-racing-league/.

#zrlrecon #wtrl #zrl #dirt

eventSeries.name: ZRL 25/26 R4
eventSeries.description: Zwift Racing League Season 20 (2025/26 - Round 4). Includes all races and official recon rides

name: Epic Run Crew: Friday Five
description:
Hello Friday! Celebrate the end of the work week with a quick 5K. Walk it, run it or race it. You are welcome to run at your own pace (AYOP). It’s up to you!

Epic Run Crew is based in Vancouver, BC, Canada. We were founded as an in-person club in 2021 and then joined Zwift in June 2022.

Use the Zwift Companion app to join the Epic Run Crew club, for access to exclusive member-only group runs.

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/epicruncrew2/
Instagram: @epicruncrew

name: ASIA 130km Endurance Ride
description:
Riding 130km is never easy but it goes by faster in a group. Join us for a long ride - stay to the end or ride as long as you can. Ride duration should be slightly above 3 hours.

This is a steady endurance ride, not a race, but we do have a sprint finish at the end. All are welcome but again, please respect the pace.

Start times are staggered to allow the groups to merge towards the end for the big finish.

name: NPRC - Run Every Day Powered By NoblePro
description:
Come and join the fastest growing running club on Zwift.  With a choice of 5 or 10k you can pick your distance. Whether you are a beginner or experienced runner come and join us, you can run at whatever pace you like, it’s not a race unless you want it to be!

Each day is a different route and as new routes are released the courses will change to allow you to bag that badge.

You will run in our in game NPRC jersey and if you complete the event you get to keep it to wear wherever you like.

We also hold special events where you can win an actual jersey to wear in real life.

NPRC Facebook – We have a facebook group where you can join and talk about all things running.  Share your stories and get help and advice.

https://www.facebook.com/groups/1223724692417314/

NoblePro: - We are a team focused on elevating running through our treadmills and digital platforms. We create treadmills loved by runners and the wider running community for quality engineered hardware features and advanced software integration to give you the freedom to train with the apps you love.
https://www.noble-pro.com/

Kinni:- In a fitness world where treadmill bluetooth integration can be a confusing place, we aim to provide you with the ability to effortlessly connect. You can run structured treadmill workouts, connect and integrate with your favourite bluetooth fitness apps such as Zwift, Rouvy, Kinomaps and many more. We are focused on progress and advancement in integration, connectivity and control.
https://kinni.co/https://kinni.co/devices/ - To see if your treadmill is compatible to link to Zwift.

Join the NoblePro Running Club (NPRC) - https://www.zwift.com/clubs/e7829ccd-bce4-4244-9ccf-4cdc3ef148ff/home

name: Workout 1: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp
description:
The Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp is where the pros put in the work, and this year, you’re invited to join them. Across five weeks of structured training, plus a make-up week, you’ll ride alongside the team on Zwift—sprinting with Jasper Philipsen and Kaden Groves, building endurance with Mathieu van der Poel, and learning from head coach Kristof De Kegel. Don't miss your chance to be a part of the structure, science, and team energy that fuels the WorldTour.

Workout 1: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp

This is where it all begins. Build the engine that carries you through every workout in this camp. Steady endurance efforts train your body to produce energy more efficiently, helping you ride longer, go farther, and feel stronger with every pedal stroke. Set the tone today—everything builds from here!

name: Zwift TT Club Racing - Glasgow Reverse
description:
The Time Trial. Cycling’s true leveler - just you and your legs versus everyone else in the field.

Come join Zwift TT Club on Zwift for more Time Trial event information! https://www.zwift.com/clubs/b3d1a903-df49-44eb-9c6f-4ba9f0622efe/home

Join us as we embark on a five-week series of events - each week you will have multiple chances to set your best time on the same route!

Over the course of the five weeks, we’ll be increasing the distance of the events.

Check out Zwiftpower.com after your event to see how well you stack up against the competition!

Don’t forget to check you’re using the fastest bike frame and wheels available to you!

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? 
For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: FRR CLASSICA SERIES - FRANCAIS - ITT
description:
Flamme Rouge Racing are excited to bring you our CLASSICA events to honour the great one day monuments of world cycling.

ITALIA
BELGICA
FRANCAIS

Each event will offer 3 races Friday to Sunday, using three formats - iTT / Scratch / Points - each race will convert to points, based on segments and finish - a riders points total will be drawn from all 3 races, do more, score more!

Each event will center around the type of course and terrain of the monument, with the actual race day event being of a length that is fitting for the monument.

Classica races are part of the FRR Weekend Warrior Race Series for which there will be at least 10 WW events, refer to website for the Schedule and rules:

Series Schedule
https://flammerougeracing.com/race-schedule/

Rules
https://flammerougeracing.com/race-rules

Event Basics
- Public events - MIXED RACING
- Five Max 30day ZRS ranged pens
- Mandatory racing experience - HRM - Smart Trainers


- Season long Order of Merit (OoM)
- Best 7 scoring events to count (an event counts the points from all 3 races over

FRR Registered riders form the OoM - Top 10 earn prizes on condition they are FRR Subscribers 

For all details, registration and how to become an FRR subscriber vist our website:
https://flammerougeracing.com/

Primary Communication via DISCORD

Discord - RACE channel for questions, updates and lively chat - it is by far the best place to clarify or report anything during the series

Invite link: https://discord.com/invite/nQNWHQK6PS

Smart Trainers - HRM
- Smart Trainers are mandatory
- Race Control can verify with the Zwift platform 
- HRMs are mandatory

So be SMART and use a SMART trainer as your PRIMARY power source where you can....

FRR Code of Conduct
- We expect the best racing behavior from all riders, if riders have an issue then always contact race control via email first, we will investigate every request raised.
- In race we do not expect riders to abuse others, flag, report to race control, screen shot etc.... riders who ignore this will be DQ'd for the season
- Discord chat remains objective and banter - anything more will be removed and warnings/bans will be issued

And finally remember we all do this for fun and exercise so ride on and enjoy the FRR events....stay safe and if it starts to hurt then welcome to the fun zone...! 
(But stop if it really does hurt too much please!)

name: ZTBR - Training Stabilization TTT
description:
Zwift Teams Brazil [ZTBR] together with Assessoria Franklin Almeida, provides this training with a focus on providing better "Stabilization" in the performance of athletes seeking better performance in Team Time Trial (TTT) events.

This training aims to help the athlete tolerate and withstand an accumulation of substrates produced by the body in sub-maximal activities, bringing more stability and control in time-based tests.

Franklin Almeida Consulting was created in 2005, with the aim of evaluating the physiological profile, developing training to improve your physical capacity, health and maximum performance.
One of the pioneers in distance consulting in Brazil!

Note: We will have other phases of this training in addition to Stabilization, they are: (Training for FTP Gains and Terrain Variations).

===
Português:
Treino de Estabilização by Franklin Almeida

Descrição: O Zwift Teams Brazil [ZTBR] juntamente com a Assessoria Franklin Almeida, disponibiliza este treino com foco em proporcionar melhor "Estabilização" na performance de atletas que buscam um melhor desempenho nos eventos tipo Team Time Trial (TTT).

Esse treino tem o objetivo de ajudar o atleta a tolerar e suportar um acúmulo de sustratos produzidos pelo organismo em atividades sub máximas trazendo mais estabilidade e controle em provas de conta relógio.

A Consultoria Franklin Almeida foi criada em 2005, com o objetivo de avaliar o perfil fisiológico, desenvolver treinos para melhorar sua capacidade física, sua saúde e desempenho máximo.
Um dos pioneiros em consultoria a distância no Brasil!

Obs.: Teremos outras fases deste treinamento além da Estabilização, são elas: (Treino para Ganhos de FTP e Variações de terreno).

name: Stage 4 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!


Stage 4
Route: Sand and Sequoias
Date: April 6-12

Wrap up the Zwift Big Spin down on Sand and Sequoias, with loads of prizes still on deck!

name: Friday Night Fun Race
description:
Get ready for the Friday Night Fun Race – the perfect way to unwind and kick-off your weekend! This is fast, friendly, and totally unserious racing designed for pure enjoyment.

Every week brings a different course and theme, so you never know what fun-fueled surprise awaits! And if that wasn't enough, everyone starts with a 'BOOST' power-up, with extras available throughout the race – that’s a speed increase for a few seconds – use it wisely!

SCHEDULE
Races are held weekly on Friday evenings across various timezones.

CATEGORIES
You’ll be categorized by your existing Racing Score for fair competition. But don't worry – race results won't impact your score, keeping the pressure low and the fun high.

Sign up for the ultimate Friday night race – fun-filled, feel-good, and guaranteed to make your weekend start with a bang!

name: Group Run 5k
description:
DESCRIPTION

Join us for a 5k group run.   It's run-at-your-own-pace and all are welcome! 

Pick the closest pace group for you, but all groups will start together and you are free to fall back and run ahead. The pace groups designate average pace for the duration of the run. Most groups will start slower and finish faster than the indicated pace. Feel free to mix in some intervals and race your friends.

name: The HERD FriYay Social
description:
It's Friday in the Western Hemisphere and time to play!  Everyone is welcome to join The Herd on this supportive and social group ride.

Respect the leader's pace and ride with the yellow beacon. This is NOT A RACE! Stronger riders are encouraged to fall back and help sweep the riders struggling in the back.

Join us on Discord during the ride: https://discord.gg/Dr7ZtPV (Please use Push-To-Talk)
Check us out on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/zHerd/

#herd

name: No Spring Chickens - Herd Masters Racing
description:
No Spring Chickens - Herd Masters Racing
No Spring Chickens is back for another round of masters racing! This is your chance to compare
yourself to riders that are the same age. It doesn’t matter if you have passed the spring chicken
stage only recently or a little longer ago, this is a race for you.
No Spring Chickens is a mass start race, all age groups will have their own starting pen, but they will
all take off together. After the finish the results for men and women will be split on ZwiftPower. That
way we hope everyone will find someone to race with and have some fun.
Series schedule:
20-22 March: Wandering Flats (25.2 km, flat, Makuri)
27-29 March: Green to Screen (28.5 km, rolling, New York)
3-5 April: Power Punches (23.7 km, repeated small climbs, Watopia)
10-12 April: Bon Voyage (31.4 km, flat to rolling, France)
17-19 April: Cobbled Crowns (24.3 km, short sharp hills, Richmond)
24-26 April:Itza Climb Finish (30 km, medium hilly finish, watopia)
Race rules:
1. No TT Bikes.
2. Steering is enabled.
3. Smarttrainer or powermeter required.
4. Heart rate monitor required.
5. No indoor bikes without controlled resistance (cadence=power).
6. Participants must be registered on zwiftpower.com to be included in the results.
7. For podium finishers in all age groups: Elite level performances above the limits stated below
must be supported by dual power recordings uploaded to Zwiftpower
○ Men: above 5w/kg or 375w for 20min / 6w/kg or 475w for 5min / 9w/kg for 1min.
○ Women: above 4.5w/kg or 280w for 20min / 5.5w/kg or 350w for 5min / 7.5w/kg for
1min.

8. For podium finishers in all age groups: Zwift activities must be saved PUBLIC for verification.

name: No Rulez Racing presented by RiZZRL: Race #4 - The Loch Loop Throwdown
description:
"🏴‍☠️ No Rulez Racing - Race #4: The Loch Loop Throwdown 🏴‍☠️

Welcome to Race #4 of No Rulez Racing. You know the drill by now: no whining, no etiquette, and absolutely no rules. Leave your sportsmanship at the start line because this week, we are taking the chaos to the misty shores of Scotland.
We are tackling 6 laps of the Loch Loop. This course is fast, rolling, and features just enough punchy rollers to snap the elastic. Expect relentless attacks, zero pacing strategy, and pure wattage warfare from the drop. 

The No Rulez Manifesto:
Bring your Tron bike. Bring your TT bike. Deploy power-ups like they're going out of style. Attack before the banner. We don't care. Just pedal fast and try not to get dropped.

⏱️ Staggered Pens: The Hunt is On
To maximize the chaos, we are running staggered pens this week. Whether you are the hunter or the hunted depends on your category. Catch the groups ahead of you, hold off the monsters chasing from behind, and ruthlessly use riders from other categories as draft fodder when you catch them.

💥 Race Tactics
Each 8km lap loops around the loch with rolling terrain and a few sneaky gradients. There are no massive climbs to break up the pack, so expect a blistering pace. With the staggered starts, the final two laps are going to be a messy, high-speed traffic jam. Surf the wheels of the categories you catch, don't get boxed in, and prepare for a massive bunch sprint at the end of lap 6.

Ride hard. Take no prisoners. See you in Scotland.

name: Workout 1 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 1: Foundations
This workout reinforces “calm control” with mostly steady work, then finishes by sharpening leg speed so you can stay smooth at any cadence.

name: Stage 1: Pas Racing: Jungle Circuit
description:
The PAS Racing Gravel Series brings the spirit and style of Pas Normal Studios to gravel racing on Zwift. Across four stages, you’ll take on demanding routes in a series designed to be raced flat out. Get a shiny new gravel bike from the Drop Shop and let it rip!

Complete any stage to win a brand new Pas Normal Jersey!

Badges are out—XP is in. Every finish fuels your progress. Earn up to 2000 XP for completing the series, including a massive 1000 XP from Stage One.

Stage 1
Route: Jungle Circuit
Date: April 6–12

The series kicks off on the Jungle Circuit in Watopia.. Line up, find your rhythm, and open the PAS Racing Series strong.

Stage 2
Route: Handful of Gravel
Date: April 13–19

The challenge builds. Handful of Gravel rewards the right setup and steady power across demanding terrain. Upgrade your build, join the next start line, and keep the momentum rolling.

Stage 3
Route: Yumezi Grit
Date: April 20–26

A brand new gravel racing route on Zwift. Fresh terrain. New lines to chase. Take on Yumezi Grit, test yourself against the field, and experience competitive gravel at its best.

Stage 4
Route: Serpentine 8
Date: April 27 – May 3

One final chance to line up and close out the PAS Racing Series. Hard routes. Real racing. Finish it strong.

MONTHLY GC COMPETITION

Looking for extra motivation? The Monthly GC (General Classification) Competition lets you track your progress across all stages. Each race counts—your times add up throughout the series, shaping the overall standings. At the end of the month, the fastest total time takes the win!

name: A Face full of Gravel Beginners series
description:
Old Dog Racing presents a series of short scenic gravel races ideal for beginner and intermediate riders. 

Perhaps you are new; maybe the old power station isn’t delivering the watts anymore, or the knees are just a little too creaky!

Come and join the fun in six weekly races, two start times, Wednesdays 5:30 pm Eastern and  Fridays 5:30 pm Pacific, If you race both times in a week your best finish will go towards your points total.

The Closely spaced non-standard categories are: 
A 3.4 - 4.0 W/kg;  B 3.0 - 3.39 W/kg; C 2.3 - 2.99 W/kg; D 1.8-2.29 W/kg and E 0-1.79 W/kg

All riders will be provided with a Specialized Crux Gravel bike and visible to each other with a staggered start…Category E will speed off first and subsequent categories as follows; D 2 minutes later; C and B a minute Later each and Finally, A  riders 30 seconds after that. (intervals may vary slightly between events depending on expected completion times.).

Riders will be issued the Zwift Category kit as an aid to identify which category riders you are currently racing against. Try and hang on to passing riders for as long as possible, stretch yourself!

Power ups to help you along your way include: The van, the steamroller and the feather
If you find yourself alone, enjoy the scenery and clock up another route badge.

Points awarded to each category in every race are: 25, 20,16,13,11,10,9,8,7,6 and 5 very generous participation points!! (You have to finish!). 
Highest accumulated points in each category wins the series.. you’re going to have to wear an HRM and have a Zwift Power account in order to be awarded points.

Earn more than 100 points and l’ll send you an Old Dog Racing Mug!*
The best race report of the series gets a mug too.* 
      *terms and conditions apply, go to Facebook page for details.

Join us on :
Zwift Companion Club - https://www.zwift.com/clubs/0ad7655f-797b-4dc2-940d-b313fca0df0a/home
Facebook -    https://www.facebook.com/groups/3001328763388965 
or Strava  -  https://strava.app.link/7JqgUWGwu1b

WOOF!

name: Friday Fearless Fartleks
description:
Fartlek, which means speed play in Swedish, is continuous training with interval training. Fartlek runs are a very simple form of a long distance run. Fartlek training is simply defined as periods of fast running intermixed with periods of slower running. For some people, this could be a mix of jogging and sprinting, but for beginners it could be walking with jogging sections added in when possible.

A good laugh and a long run are the two best cures for anything.

Join to challenge yourself and for the group run fun!

Hosted by Team Fearless. To hear about our other rides and runs or learn more about our women's team, head to our Facebook Fans page at https://www.facebook.com/groups/TeamFearlessZR/

name: Workout 2: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp
description:
The Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp is where the pros put in the work, and this year, you’re invited to join them. Across five weeks of structured training, plus a make-up week, you’ll ride alongside the team on Zwift—sprinting with Jasper Philipsen and Kaden Groves, building endurance with Mathieu van der Poel, and learning from head coach Kristof De Kegel. Don't miss your chance to be a part of the structure, science, and team energy that fuels the WorldTour.

Workout 2: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp

Get ready for a power-focused session built around high-torque intervals and structured recovery. Each effort builds the strength you need for explosive moments, and every recovery helps you reset and go again. This is where raw power starts to show up!

name: Zwift TT Club Racing - Glasgow Reverse
description:
The Time Trial. Cycling’s true leveler - just you and your legs versus everyone else in the field.

Come join Zwift TT Club on Zwift for more Time Trial event information! https://www.zwift.com/clubs/b3d1a903-df49-44eb-9c6f-4ba9f0622efe/home

Join us as we embark on a five-week series of events - each week you will have multiple chances to set your best time on the same route!

Over the course of the five weeks, we’ll be increasing the distance of the events.

Check out Zwiftpower.com after your event to see how well you stack up against the competition!

Don’t forget to check you’re using the fastest bike frame and wheels available to you!

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? 
For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: Zwift Crit Racing Club - Glasgow Reverse
description:
It's Crit time! Come and join in the fun on a number of multi-lap short routes. Get ready to dig deep and push to the finish line!

What is Racing Score?

Racing Score is an intuitive system that replaces the traditional categories (A - D) with a 0-1000 scale to reflect your current level, considering various metrics like race performances and power. This score helps Zwift recommend the most competitive band to race in, ensuring a fun, rewarding, and exciting experience as you track your progression throughout your Zwift racing adventures.

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: TeamZF Zinger Social 🚴🏻‍♂️
description:
Come one, come all for our TeamZF Beginner Zinger Social ride! This delightful bunch will keep you entertained for a pleasing average pace of 1.3 – 1.5 w/kg. We’ll stick to the advertised pace and ride for an hour or 1 lap, depending on the course of the day. 

This is a great ride for beginners just learning their way around Zwift and seasoned Zwifters, alike. The beacon’s where it’s at, so stick with your ride leader for the most chatter and support. You can always help your teammates earn extra drops by passing out Ride Ons as you go! 

If you would like to represent TeamZF officially please add “TeamZF” after your name and join our Zwiftpower Team: https://zwiftpower.com/team.php?id=1469

Please make sure you join out Official Club via the Companion App to keep up with upcoming events. Alternatively bookmark the link to all our public events: https://www.zwift.com/events/tag/teamzf

If social media is your thing, Join our fun and supportive community on facebook: 
www.facebook.com/groups/teamzf/

*** Please respect the leader’s instructions and advertised pace. Although we pride ourselves on riding within the advertised pace PLEASE NOTE, wk/g average will differ from each rider and change with the route terrain ***

#teamzf #thesweatexperts #pillarapp

name: NPRC - Run Every Day Powered By NoblePro
description:
Come and join the fastest growing running club on Zwift.  With a choice of 5 or 10k you can pick your distance. Whether you are a beginner or experienced runner come and join us, you can run at whatever pace you like, it’s not a race unless you want it to be!

Each day is a different route and as new routes are released the courses will change to allow you to bag that badge.

You will run in our in game NPRC jersey and if you complete the event you get to keep it to wear wherever you like.

We also hold special events where you can win an actual jersey to wear in real life.

NPRC Facebook – We have a facebook group where you can join and talk about all things running.  Share your stories and get help and advice.

https://www.facebook.com/groups/1223724692417314/

NoblePro: - We are a team focused on elevating running through our treadmills and digital platforms. We create treadmills loved by runners and the wider running community for quality engineered hardware features and advanced software integration to give you the freedom to train with the apps you love.
https://www.noble-pro.com/

Kinni:- In a fitness world where treadmill bluetooth integration can be a confusing place, we aim to provide you with the ability to effortlessly connect. You can run structured treadmill workouts, connect and integrate with your favourite bluetooth fitness apps such as Zwift, Rouvy, Kinomaps and many more. We are focused on progress and advancement in integration, connectivity and control.
https://kinni.co/https://kinni.co/devices/ - To see if your treadmill is compatible to link to Zwift.

Join the NoblePro Running Club (NPRC) - https://www.zwift.com/clubs/e7829ccd-bce4-4244-9ccf-4cdc3ef148ff/home

name: FRR CLASSICA SERIES - FRANCAIS - ITT
description:
Flamme Rouge Racing are excited to bring you our CLASSICA events to honour the great one day monuments of world cycling.

ITALIA
BELGICA
FRANCAIS

Each event will offer 3 races Friday to Sunday, using three formats - iTT / Scratch / Points - each race will convert to points, based on segments and finish - a riders points total will be drawn from all 3 races, do more, score more!

Each event will center around the type of course and terrain of the monument, with the actual race day event being of a length that is fitting for the monument.

Classica races are part of the FRR Weekend Warrior Race Series for which there will be at least 10 WW events, refer to website for the Schedule and rules:

Series Schedule
https://flammerougeracing.com/race-schedule/

Rules
https://flammerougeracing.com/race-rules

Event Basics
- Public events - MIXED RACING
- Five Max 30day ZRS ranged pens
- Mandatory racing experience - HRM - Smart Trainers


- Season long Order of Merit (OoM)
- Best 7 scoring events to count (an event counts the points from all 3 races over

FRR Registered riders form the OoM - Top 10 earn prizes on condition they are FRR Subscribers 

For all details, registration and how to become an FRR subscriber vist our website:
https://flammerougeracing.com/

Primary Communication via DISCORD

Discord - RACE channel for questions, updates and lively chat - it is by far the best place to clarify or report anything during the series

Invite link: https://discord.com/invite/nQNWHQK6PS

Smart Trainers - HRM
- Smart Trainers are mandatory
- Race Control can verify with the Zwift platform 
- HRMs are mandatory

So be SMART and use a SMART trainer as your PRIMARY power source where you can....

FRR Code of Conduct
- We expect the best racing behavior from all riders, if riders have an issue then always contact race control via email first, we will investigate every request raised.
- In race we do not expect riders to abuse others, flag, report to race control, screen shot etc.... riders who ignore this will be DQ'd for the season
- Discord chat remains objective and banter - anything more will be removed and warnings/bans will be issued

And finally remember we all do this for fun and exercise so ride on and enjoy the FRR events....stay safe and if it starts to hurt then welcome to the fun zone...! 
(But stop if it really does hurt too much please!)

name: Workout 1 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 1: Foundations
This workout reinforces “calm control” with mostly steady work, then finishes by sharpening leg speed so you can stay smooth at any cadence.

name: Stage 1: Pas Racing: Jungle Circuit
description:
The PAS Racing Gravel Series brings the spirit and style of Pas Normal Studios to gravel racing on Zwift. Across four stages, you’ll take on demanding routes in a series designed to be raced flat out. Get a shiny new gravel bike from the Drop Shop and let it rip!

Complete any stage to win a brand new Pas Normal Jersey!

Badges are out—XP is in. Every finish fuels your progress. Earn up to 2000 XP for completing the series, including a massive 1000 XP from Stage One.

Stage 1
Route: Jungle Circuit
Date: April 6–12

The series kicks off on the Jungle Circuit in Watopia.. Line up, find your rhythm, and open the PAS Racing Series strong.

Stage 2
Route: Handful of Gravel
Date: April 13–19

The challenge builds. Handful of Gravel rewards the right setup and steady power across demanding terrain. Upgrade your build, join the next start line, and keep the momentum rolling.

Stage 3
Route: Yumezi Grit
Date: April 20–26

A brand new gravel racing route on Zwift. Fresh terrain. New lines to chase. Take on Yumezi Grit, test yourself against the field, and experience competitive gravel at its best.

Stage 4
Route: Serpentine 8
Date: April 27 – May 3

One final chance to line up and close out the PAS Racing Series. Hard routes. Real racing. Finish it strong.

MONTHLY GC COMPETITION

Looking for extra motivation? The Monthly GC (General Classification) Competition lets you track your progress across all stages. Each race counts—your times add up throughout the series, shaping the overall standings. At the end of the month, the fastest total time takes the win!
VIEW RESULTS: https://www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/pasracing2026

—------------------

name: Fast Friday Workout
description:
Congratulations, you crushed another week of workouts! If you’re looking to cap off a great week with another can't-miss training session, check out Fast Friday on Zwift. 

A new workout series to put in your weekly run rotation, Fast Friday is a simple and streamlined way to get your heart rate up. We’re focusing on short reps here, clocking in fast intervals that help runners increase their top speed. Short. Sharp. Fast. High-intensity intervals are proven to take your performance to the next level. So lace up and get moving for just 20–30 minutes every Friday before checking out of the office and into the weekend. 

#fastfriday

name: Friday Night Fun Race
description:
Get ready for the Friday Night Fun Race – the perfect way to unwind and kick-off your weekend! This is fast, friendly, and totally unserious racing designed for pure enjoyment.

Every week brings a different course and theme, so you never know what fun-fueled surprise awaits! And if that wasn't enough, everyone starts with a 'BOOST' power-up, with extras available throughout the race – that’s a speed increase for a few seconds – use it wisely!

SCHEDULE
Races are held weekly on Friday evenings across various timezones.

CATEGORIES
You’ll be categorized by your existing Racing Score for fair competition. But don't worry – race results won't impact your score, keeping the pressure low and the fun high.

Sign up for the ultimate Friday night race – fun-filled, feel-good, and guaranteed to make your weekend start with a bang!

name: The Zombie 5k
description:
Brought to you from the NoblePro Running Club (NPRC) this event is called the Zombie Run as for those in the UK this event is in the middle of the night.

Whether you are a beginner or experienced runner come and join, you can run at whatever pace you like, it's not a race.
If you don't want to run 5k then come along for as long as you wish, the support is always appreciated.
The event runs at the same time each day, Tuesday to Saturday and each day there is a different course.

NoblePro: - We are a team focused on elevating running through our treadmills and digital platforms. We create treadmills loved by runners and the wider running community for quality engineered hardware features and advanced software integration to give you the freedom to train with the apps you love.

description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 1: Foundations
This workout reinforces “calm control” with mostly steady work, then finishes by sharpening leg speed so you can stay smooth at any cadence.

name: Workout 3: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp
description:
The Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp is where the pros put in the work, and this year, you’re invited to join them. Across five weeks of structured training, plus a make-up week, you’ll ride alongside the team on Zwift—sprinting with Jasper Philipsen and Kaden Groves, building endurance with Mathieu van der Poel, and learning from head coach Kristof De Kegel. Don't miss your chance to be a part of the structure, science, and team energy that fuels the WorldTour.

Workout 3: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp

This session sharpens your ability to ride smoothly and confidently at tempo pace. You’ll practice holding a steady rhythm like the peloton, with short pushes toward FTP to prepare when the pace lifts. Calm, controlled—this is where flow meets fitness.

name: Valhalla Saturday Awakening
description:
Welcome to a nice ride to start the weekend. 45 minutes of quiet for all levels. With that well known Valhalla Team Spirit, come and prepare your legs for that Sunday race, recover after a hard week, or just have a little outing before going to work.

Everyone is most welcome, wherever you live.

This is a D Group Ride, not a race. Average watts will be between 1.8 to 2.2W/KG.

Please respect the Ride Leader and Sweeper.

You can find out more about Vikings and Valhalla at https://www.facebook.com/groups/503388660165279/?ref=share

name: Cycle Nation Endurance Ride
description:
Welcome to the Cycle Nation Endurance Rides. Join us for our series of weekend endurance rides aimed at Zwifters looking for long group rides. All riders are welcome to join the event and enjoy the friendly atmosphere and share banter. These are #DoubleDraft rides and as such it really helps if you try and stay in the main bunch and enjoy the draft. We ask that all riders respect the ride pace and stay around the leaders yellow beacon and not ride off the front.

This is NOT A RACE but a group endurance ride . Form groups and settle at a pace that suits you or ride along and follow the ride leaders instructions. Stronger riders are encouraged to assist with sweeping duties.

If you are joining our Cat C ride, please read the separate description for this.

Join our Facebook Group: https://bit.ly/38TTtAh
Join our Zwift Team: https://bit.ly/3D2Q4zL
Join our Strava Club: https://bit.ly/3pEDkFM
Instagram: https://bit.ly/3pEsdN6

eventSubgroups.name: Cycle Nation Endurance Ride (C)
eventSubgroups.description:
The Cat C ride is structured in three parts:

The first tempo section is a steady, controlled effort at 2.8-3.0 w/kg to settle in.

Then comes the Twist—approximately 10 minutes at 3.0-3.5 w/kg.

Then we finish with a final steady block at 2.8–3.0 w/kg for 5 laps, with optional sprints, focusing on control, consistency, and finishing together.

name: Aktivitus 2 h Group Workout
description:
The purpose of these workouts is the development of endurance (Aerobic muscular adaptation). Improved aerobic adaptation of the working muscles will increase your power output at anaerobic threshold (AT/FTP/LT2) and as well on your aerobic
threshold (LT/LT1). Endurance development. The WOs in this serie (eSRT Aktivitus Endurance WOs) contain intensities around the weetspot and aerobic threshold to create a time-efficient aerobic adaptation.
Please note that it is important to have your FTP correctly set in Zwift.
For more anaerobic(explosive) orientated persons (less aerobic developed, not so good endurance compared to oxygen uptake and/or explosive capacity), this WOs will be good for you!
The WO´s are designed by Aktivitus - the leading test and coaching operations in Sweden www.aktivitus.se
3. Change the banner to the one that is attached
4. Change the Saturdays WO to this one: https://whatsonzwift.com/workouts/aktivitus-10wk-ironteam-endurance

Badges are out—XP is in. Every finish fuels your progress. Earn up to 2000 XP for completing the series, including a massive 1000 XP from Stage One.

Stage 1
Route: Jungle Circuit
Date: April 6–12

The series kicks off on the Jungle Circuit in Watopia.. Line up, find your rhythm, and open the PAS Racing Series strong.

Stage 2
Route: Handful of Gravel
Date: April 13–19

The challenge builds. Handful of Gravel rewards the right setup and steady power across demanding terrain. Upgrade your build, join the next start line, and keep the momentum rolling.

Stage 3
Route: Yumezi Grit
Date: April 20–26

A brand new gravel racing route on Zwift. Fresh terrain. New lines to chase. Take on Yumezi Grit, test yourself against the field, and experience competitive gravel at its best.

Stage 4
Route: Serpentine 8
Date: April 27 – May 3

One final chance to line up and close out the PAS Racing Series. Hard routes. Real racing. Finish it strong.

MONTHLY GC COMPETITION

Looking for extra motivation? The Monthly GC (General Classification) Competition lets you track your progress across all stages. Each race counts—your times add up throughout the series, shaping the overall standings. At the end of the month, the fastest total time takes the win!
VIEW RESULTS: https://www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/pasracing2026

—------------------

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that in order to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

name: ZTPL Cycling Club Psycho Poranek Endurance Ride
description:
Zapraszamy na wspólny poranny event z ZTPL Cycling Club.
Z założenia nasze jazdy prowadzą liderzy, którzy pomagają trzymać peleton w ryzach. Jeśli podczas eventu zabraknie lidera, starajcie się trzymać tempo na które się umówiliśmy w momencie gdy dołączyliście do wybranej grupy. To od Was zależy jak będziecie się bawić 😊
Po ukończonym evencie, jeśli jechaliście z nami pierwszy raz, w Waszym wirtualnym garażu będzie czekała nasza teamowa koszulka!

◾️ Wartości podane w opisach dotyczą średniego tempa z CAŁEJ jazdy (nie uwzględniają interwałów, które mogą wystąpić podczas np. podjazdów)
◾️ PAMIĘTAJCIE, że podczas jazd grupowych NIE UŻYWAMY ROWERÓW CZASOWYCH!
◾️ Starajcie się pilnować peletonu i nie zgubić koła, samemu bardzo trudno jest odrobić stratę.
◾️ Proszę słuchajcie poleceń lidera, które podczas jazdy wyświetlane są na środku ekranu. Szczególnie jeśli lider zauważy że grupa się porwała.
◾️ Lider, który prowadzi grupę podświetlony jest na żółto.
◾️ Starajcie się jechać blisko lidera, starając się go nie wyprzedzać i nie wyjeżdżać przed bramę, która informuje Was że jedziecie za szybko.

◾️Podoba się Wam to co robimy? Zawsze możecie postawić Waszym kochanym administratorom oraz liderom naszych jazd wirtualną kawę :) https://buycoffee.to/ztplcc
◾️Jeśli chcecie sprawić sobie już teraz naszą nową teamową koszulkę ZTPL Cycling Club zapraszamy bezpośrednio na stronę https://inoni.cc/?s=ztpl&post_type=product
◾️Cała gama naszych koszulek oraz informacje o kolejnych Pre-Orderach znajdziecie na https://ztpl.cc/stroje-ztpl-cc/
◾️Nasze casualowe koszulki znajdziecie u Wintertala: https://wintertal.com/pl/133-ztplcc

◾️Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ZwiftPolska
◾️Grupa na facebooku: Polska Społeczność Zwift https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwift.polska
◾️Instagram: #ZTPLCyclingClub https://www.instagram.com/ztpl.cc/
◾️Strava: https://www.strava.com/clubs/182377
◾️Nasz klub w Companionie: https://www.zwift.com/eu/clubs/ztplcc
◾️Nasze wszystkie klubowe jazdy: https://www.zwift.com/eu/events/tag/ztplcc
◾️Nasza strona internetowa: https://ztpl.cc/

#RideOn #ZTPLCC

[ENG]
Join us for a morning group ride with ZTPL Cycling Club!
Our rides are typically led by designated ride leaders who help keep the peloton in order. If, for any reason, a leader is not present during the event, please try to maintain the agreed pace of the group you joined.
It’s up to you how much fun you’ll have! 😊

◾️Please listen to the leader’s commands which are displayed in yellow during the whole ride. The leader who leads the group is highlighted in yellow. Please don’t pass the leader.
◾️Please follow the leader instructions! Especially if the leader notices that the group has been swept away. The leader is highlighted in yellow.

◾️If you would like to get yourself our ZTPL Cycling Club team jersey please visit our shop https://inoni.cc/en/?s=ztpl&post_type=product
or you can order our Casual T-Shirt and Hoodies https://wintertal.com/en/133-ztplcc

name: Stage 4 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!


Stage 4
Route: Sand and Sequoias
Date: April 6-12

Wrap up the Zwift Big Spin down on Sand and Sequoias, with loads of prizes still on deck!

name: Hercules - The Fellowship of the Badgerhood
description:
Start your day right with The Fellowship of the Badgerhood — a super friendly and inclusive group ride on Zwift! We ride with the rubber band enabled, so no one gets dropped, and everyone stays together no matter the pace.

Expect great chat, good vibes, quizzes, fun facts and a welcoming atmosphere for all riders, whether you're new to Zwift or a seasoned pro.

Please join our Zwift Club at https://www.zwift.com/uk/clubs/d6581e47-deb2-46ed-a278-5777d5d2fd0f/home

Please join our Facebook Group at https://www.facebook.com/groups/2606407819659263/

Please join us online at https://herculesrunningandtri.com/

Please join us on Strava at https://www.strava.com/clubs/herculesrunningandtriclub

If you would like to own our famous Pink & Black Club Kit in real life, please order at https://tinyurl.com/herculestrirun

name: EVO CC Badge(r) Hunting Series (Avg 1.8-2.2w/kg) Category: D
description:
Welcome to Evolution Cyclings Badge Hunting series.

This ride targets riders at all levels who are wanting to complete Route Badges and climbs. The Average pace will be 1.8 - 2.2 w/kg.
We ask that all riders respect the pace set by the leader (yellow beacon.) Your co-operation and teamwork is essential to keep the group together. There will be sweepers (Red Beacon) on the ride to help, please ask for help as early as possible.
We actively encourage you to bring your best chat and send messages via the keyboard or Companion app to communicate in ride.

All riders will appear in the same [EVO] kit.

#EVO

name: INC Relentless Endurance Intervals
description:
Innovation cycling club (INC) offers you one of his relentless ultra intervals to boost your fitness in a nice and friendly atmosphere. Get in the Alien train to improve your long distance fitness and challenge yourself with fabulous DIY workouts based on ground variations.

GROUP B: 6:00am gmt Distance: 100km - Base Pace 2.8-3.0 W/kg, Intervals 3.5-4.0 W/kg ETA: 2:15 2:30

GROUP C: 6:02am gmt Distance: 80km - Base Pace 2.5-2.8 W/kg Intervals 3.0-3.6 W/kg ETA 2-2:15

Sometimes higher short efforts and sprints could be included. show up in front blob to challenge yourself and move the group forward or sit in the pack enjoying the draft for a more relaxing ride. Respect the leaders, keep a positive mindset here and be relentless. Go go Aliens!

name: EVO CC Igniter [~2.8-3.6w/kg avg]
description:
Welcome to the Evolution Cycling Club [EVO] interval session. These rides are geared towards Zwifters that are looking for a varied content one hour session that can give them a full 5 zone workout. Draft in the group and stay zone 1-3, or move to the front and join the sprints for zones 4 and 5 for short bursts. Average for this ride will be mid to high Category B but it may vary based upon course/leader. There will be keepers at the back, and they will try hard to save dropped riders. The group is based upon high social interaction so bring your best banter. Use the mobile app or a keyboard to communicate in-ride.

#evo

name: Vitality for UNICEF Group Ride
description:
Vitality, in partnership with UNICEF, is teaming up with Zwift for a series of great social rides for a fantastic cause. Don’t miss out. Join our social rides of 45 minutes to one hour and do your part to give kids a head start. Keeping you active and helping Vitality and UNICEF vaccinate millions of children worldwide.

We encourage everyone to stay together for this social ride. Every ride completion will help UNICEF vaccinate a child against polio.

About Vitality:
 
Guided by a core purpose of making people healthier, Vitality is the leader in shared-value by creating healthy behavior changes in insurance. By blending technology, data, incentives, and behavioural science, Vitality inspires healthy changes in individuals and organizations. 

In partnership with UNICEF, Vitality aims to vaccinate millions of children against polio by donating vaccines on behalf of participants who complete the Vitality for UNICEF Ride series events.

Furthermore, the partnership with Zwift has been established as part of Vitality’s global pledge to get 100 million people 20% more active by 2025 through incentives to live healthier, more active lifestyles.

name: NPRC - Run Every Day Powered By NoblePro
description:
Come and join the fastest growing running club on Zwift.  With a choice of 5 or 10k you can pick your distance. Whether you are a beginner or experienced runner come and join us, you can run at whatever pace you like, it’s not a race unless you want it to be!

Each day is a different route and as new routes are released the courses will change to allow you to bag that badge.

You will run in our in game NPRC jersey and if you complete the event you get to keep it to wear wherever you like.

We also hold special events where you can win an actual jersey to wear in real life.

NPRC Facebook – We have a facebook group where you can join and talk about all things running.  Share your stories and get help and advice.

https://www.facebook.com/groups/1223724692417314/

NoblePro: - We are a team focused on elevating running through our treadmills and digital platforms. We create treadmills loved by runners and the wider running community for quality engineered hardware features and advanced software integration to give you the freedom to train with the apps you love.
https://www.noble-pro.com/

Kinni:- In a fitness world where treadmill bluetooth integration can be a confusing place, we aim to provide you with the ability to effortlessly connect. You can run structured treadmill workouts, connect and integrate with your favourite bluetooth fitness apps such as Zwift, Rouvy, Kinomaps and many more. We are focused on progress and advancement in integration, connectivity and control.
https://kinni.co/https://kinni.co/devices/ - To see if your treadmill is compatible to link to Zwift.

Join the NoblePro Running Club (NPRC) - https://www.zwift.com/clubs/e7829ccd-bce4-4244-9ccf-4cdc3ef148ff/home

name: Endure IQ Training Squad Session
description:
--------------------
SESSION FOCUS
--------------------
The focus of this session is on building basic endurance and fat burning incorporating cadence and power changes to stimulate technique and keep you supple. We are targeting the uper end of Zone 2 and Lower Zone 3 in and around LT1 where slow twitch muscle fibers are maximally recruited. This focussed intensity will make sure you get the most from your base training.
--------------------
WARM-UP:
15min easy build
MAIN-SET:
20min blocks + 5min relaxed
COOL-DOWN:
5-10min easy
--------------------

name: FRR CLASSICA SERIES - FRANCAIS - POINTS
description:
Flamme Rouge Racing are excited to bring you our CLASSICA events to honour the great one day monuments of world cycling.

ITALIA
BELGICA
FRANCAIS

Each event will offer 3 races Friday to Sunday, using three formats - iTT / Scratch / Points - each race will convert to points, based on segments and finish - a riders points total will be drawn from all 3 races, do more, score more!

Each event will center around the type of course and terrain of the monument, with the actual race day event being of a length that is fitting for the monument.

Classica races are part of the FRR Weekend Warrior Race Series for which there will be at least 10 WW events, refer to website for the Schedule and rules:

Series Schedule
https://flammerougeracing.com/race-schedule/

Rules
https://flammerougeracing.com/race-rules

Event Basics
- Public events - MIXED RACING
- Five Max 30day ZRS ranged pens
- Mandatory racing experience - HRM - Smart Trainers


- Season long Order of Merit (OoM)
- Best 7 scoring events to count (an event counts the points from all 3 races over

FRR Registered riders form the OoM - Top 10 earn prizes on condition they are FRR Subscribers 

For all details, registration and how to become an FRR subscriber vist our website:
https://flammerougeracing.com/

Primary Communication via DISCORD

Discord - RACE channel for questions, updates and lively chat - it is by far the best place to clarify or report anything during the series

Invite link: https://discord.com/invite/nQNWHQK6PS

Smart Trainers - HRM
- Smart Trainers are mandatory
- Race Control can verify with the Zwift platform 
- HRMs are mandatory

So be SMART and use a SMART trainer as your PRIMARY power source where you can....

FRR Code of Conduct
- We expect the best racing behavior from all riders, if riders have an issue then always contact race control via email first, we will investigate every request raised.
- In race we do not expect riders to abuse others, flag, report to race control, screen shot etc.... riders who ignore this will be DQ'd for the season
- Discord chat remains objective and banter - anything more will be removed and warnings/bans will be issued

And finally remember we all do this for fun and exercise so ride on and enjoy the FRR events....stay safe and if it starts to hurt then welcome to the fun zone...! 
(But stop if it really does hurt too much please!)

name: Workout 1 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 1: Foundations
This workout reinforces “calm control” with mostly steady work, then finishes by sharpening leg speed so you can stay smooth at any cadence.

name: Workout 4: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp
description:
The Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp is where the pros put in the work, and this year, you’re invited to join them. Across five weeks of structured training, plus a make-up week, you’ll ride alongside the team on Zwift—sprinting with Jasper Philipsen and Kaden Groves, building endurance with Mathieu van der Poel, and learning from head coach Kristof De Kegel. Don't miss your chance to be a part of the structure, science, and team energy that fuels the WorldTour.

Workout 4: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp

This session builds explosive power and increases anaerobic capacity. You’ll tackle short, high-intensity efforts above threshold, each followed by controlled recovery. The goal is simple: hit every interval with focus and intent. This is race-style power—sharp, repeatable, and decisive.

name: Vikings Valhalla - A Winter Of Shenanigans
description:
🎉 Gather 'round, bold Vikings of the virtual world! 🚴‍♂️ Ready your steeds for an unforgettable escapade at "Vikings Valhalla - Shenanigans' Spring Festival" – the ride that will have even Freya herself in awe!

🌸 Cruise through routes that make the blooming fields of Asgard look like mere playgrounds! 💪 Our rides will forge you into a true Viking warrior with workouts that'll have you wielding your virtual shield like a pro.

🤪 But fear not, this isn't just about the grind – it's Shenanigans' Spring Festival! 🎉 Dive into games that'll have you laughing harder than Loki's tricks. We promise, no mischievous elves allowed!

🌼 Prepare yourself for floral challenges, blooming banter, and the kind of camaraderie that only a band of virtual Vikings can summon. 🛡️ It's not just a ride; it's a quest to the mythical land of fitness and fun!

Join us on Zwift for "Vikings Valhalla - Shenanigans' Spring Festival," where the only thing more radiant than the sun is our sense of humor. Helmets and horns are optional – but epicness is guaranteed! 🌞⚔️
