name: Fudging Slacker Sunrise Ride: Endurance + Sprints
description:
Fudging Slackers Sunrise Ride: Endurance + Sprints + Chase 

ATTENTION: THE CHASE IS ON! 
The fence drops the last 5-10km. Endurance miles, bonus sprints, and Group C charging after Group D Ride.

• Up to 100 km. 
• D: 2.0-2.5 w/kg | C: 2.5-3.1 w/kg. 
• Fence ON - stay with the ride leader.
• Called sprints - smash it, then regroup.
• Social, steady, supportive - we roll and recover together.

Good vibes. Clean chase. No fence fugitives.
Fence drops last 10k for Group C to try and catch Group D.

Let’s ride into the sunrise like we meant to wake up this early.

name: Team Italy Saturday Morning Fever
description:
Team Italy Saturday Morning Fever Ride, this is our sporty way to start into the weekend.
Join us for an avg 2.5 to 3.0 W/kg ride, 90 minutes, perfect to improve your endurance. The individual power range depends on course and leader - please check the weekly individual announcement. Independent of your fitness level (pro, ambitious rider, newbie, who wants to go fast) we ride and chat and have fun.
For those, who want to join Italian fast conversations, please join our corresponding discord channel: https://discord.gg/TSYYfgtSJw

name: Stage 4 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!


Stage 4
Route: Sand and Sequoias
Date: April 6-12

Wrap up the Zwift Big Spin down on Sand and Sequoias, with loads of prizes still on deck!

name: Granfondo Scannellatori
description:
Saturday is time for Grand Fondo!
Some routes on Zwift are too hard to be ridden alone.
No worries, Scannellatori Seriali helps you with this new series.

The event is set as a race but everybody is free to decide how to ride it, like in a GF.
You can race pushing to your limit or ride it as a group ride, finding a GRUPPETTO with the same tempo and enjoying the DOUBLE DRAFT.

Join us, find your Gruppetto and complete some of the most challenging routes on Zwift!

-double draft
-steering enabled
-one start for everyone

name: 3R Endurance Steady Ride
description:
This is a 3R Group Ride Event. Your co-operation and teamwork is essential to the success of the ride and we ask that no riders ride off the front of the group. The event is designed as part of 3R’s package of #ProStyleTraining events to assist with the attainment of your training goals and may include intervals over and below the ride average parameters. This is not a race so please follow the leader beacon's (Yellow) instructions and if you are feeling strong, please help the keeper beacon (Red) to assist other riders back to the pack. We welcome good banter and aim to create a fun, social atmosphere for your training. We welcome any feedback on our Facebook page https://www.facebook.com/groups/ClubWorldBicycleRelief/ #Team3R #Ride3R #RideRaceRaise.
#3r

The A category ride is for riders looking for a ride comparable to a ride in real life, going easy on flats and hard on the climbs.

Mostly not fenced to have the opportunities for PRs.

A minimum FTP of 4.0w/kg is recommended.

eventSubgroups.name: 3R Endurance Steady Ride (C)
eventSubgroups.description:
This is a 3R Group Ride Event. Your co-operation and teamwork is essential to the success of the ride and we ask that no riders ride off the front of the group. The event is designed as part of 3R’s package of #ProStyleTraining events to assist with the attainment of your training goals and may include intervals over and below the ride average parameters. This is not a race so please follow the leader beacon's (Yellow) instructions and if you are feeling strong, please help the keeper beacon (Red) to assist other riders back to the pack. We welcome good banter and aim to create a fun, social atmosphere for your training. We welcome any feedback on our Facebook page https://www.facebook.com/groups/ClubWorldBicycleRelief/ #Team3R #Ride3R #RideRaceRaise.
#3r

name: SZR  Endurance Ride
description:
The goal with the SZR Endurance Ride is to focus on the Group and keeping the Group together while having fun to make the time fly fast!

The SZR Endurance Ride is divided into C, D and E categories, the tempo is shown next to the ride category, this is rider weight / gender dependant.

Please make sure you choose the correct group when signing up for this ride.

Note that the average is for the total ride! There might be variations above or under the average during the ride.

- This is a social group ride and not a race. Staying close to the ride leader is the key. Respect and support the group!
- Follow the ride leaders instructions at all times.
- After steep hills we focus on getting the group together. Soft pedal if ahead to regroup faster.
- In case of a drop-out or any other issues, we do have great sweep support to help you back to the group!

Communication is the key so make sure you can call (chat message) out for help and do it as soon as possible.

Use our discord if you like to have a real talk with the people on the ride:
https://discord.gg/DQHybQT
You'll find us in the Endurance Ride C/D/E channels

name: EVO CC Endurance Ride [2.5-2.7w/kg avg]
description:
Welcome to the Evolution Cycling Club [EVO] weekend edition. This ride is geared towards Zwifters that are looking for a longer steady cat C ride.
The average for the ride being around the 2.5-2.7w/kg depending on the riders weight and course.

Strong riders are always welcome to help and offer assistance at the back. We welcome good chat and a social atmosphere for new and experienced Zwifters alike, everyone is welcome.
Total ride time circa 4Hrs 15 / 4Hrs 20 - course depending.
#evo #doubledraft

eventSubgroups.name: EVO CC Endurance Ride [2.5-2.7w/kg avg] (C)
eventSubgroups.description:
Welcome to the Evolution Cycling Club [EVO] weekend edition. These rides are geared towards Zwifter’s that are looking for a longer ride Cat B & Cat C ride.

The average for the Cat B group will be 3.0-3.2 w/kg, depending on riders weight, course and leader, with the Cat C group being around the 2.5-2.7w/kg.

Strong riders are always welcomed to assist the group and help riders back into the pack.

High social interaction is a feature of EVO rides, so bring your best banter! Use the mobile app or a keyboard to communicate in-ride.

#evo #doubledraft

name: Bikealicious Rubber Band Joy Ride
description:
The Saturday edition of the weekly Joy Ride tackles some of the longer routes in Zwift with everything you’d expect from the Joy Ride crew! Our mission is to push you further than before, build your endurance, and have fun. If you are feeling strong, push to the front and drag the group, if not, just sit in the peloton.

We have the “rubber-band” activated, which means that no matter what level you are, you will be able to keep up, and the group WILL STAY TOGETHER. The rubber band allows you to ride at your own pace, slow or fast, and you are guaranteed to stay in the group.

The ride speed may be slightly less than other group rides due to the rubber band effect, but that’s a small price to pay to allow riders of all levels to remain together throughout the ride. We are all about teamwork, working together as a group, and we look forward to riding with you!

name: Workout 1 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 1: Foundations
This workout reinforces “calm control” with mostly steady work, then finishes by sharpening leg speed so you can stay smooth at any cadence.

name: Stage 1: Pas Racing: Jungle Circuit
description:
The PAS Racing Gravel Series brings the spirit and style of Pas Normal Studios to gravel racing on Zwift. Across four stages, you’ll take on demanding routes in a series designed to be raced flat out. Get a shiny new gravel bike from the Drop Shop and let it rip!

Complete any stage to win a brand new Pas Normal Jersey!

Badges are out—XP is in. Every finish fuels your progress. Earn up to 2000 XP for completing the series, including a massive 1000 XP from Stage One.

Stage 1
Route: Jungle Circuit
Date: April 6–12

The series kicks off on the Jungle Circuit in Watopia.. Line up, find your rhythm, and open the PAS Racing Series strong.

Stage 2
Route: Handful of Gravel
Date: April 13–19

The challenge builds. Handful of Gravel rewards the right setup and steady power across demanding terrain. Upgrade your build, join the next start line, and keep the momentum rolling.

Stage 3
Route: Yumezi Grit
Date: April 20–26

A brand new gravel racing route on Zwift. Fresh terrain. New lines to chase. Take on Yumezi Grit, test yourself against the field, and experience competitive gravel at its best.

Stage 4
Route: Serpentine 8
Date: April 27 – May 3

One final chance to line up and close out the PAS Racing Series. Hard routes. Real racing. Finish it strong.

MONTHLY GC COMPETITION

Looking for extra motivation? The Monthly GC (General Classification) Competition lets you track your progress across all stages. Each race counts—your times add up throughout the series, shaping the overall standings. At the end of the month, the fastest total time takes the win!
VIEW RESULTS: https://www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/pasracing2026

—------------------

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that in order to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

name: Vikings Valhalla Saturday Shenanigans
description:
Fancy a lie in? Need a ride a little later than the Early Bird Shenanigans? No need to look any further. Welcome to Valhalla Saturday Shenanigans - the perfect ride for all those who are looking for a fun and cheeky ride as soon as the sun rises and the birds are already singing.

Valhalla are all about teamwork and that‘s why all we ask from you is to work as a group and bring some fun blather.

We offer you a cheerful ride with different leaders and courses every week with two different groups of effort levels. Expect an avg ride pace between 1.8 wkg and 2.7 wkg depending on lead, course and group. The pace may vary on certain parts of the course or for a certain time.

Please come and join us on our Valhalla Shenanigans Ride and enjoy the Valhalla way of working together and for one goal.

Find out more about Team Valhalla and the Vikings on our Facebook page and sign up for your next group ride today:
https://www.facebook.com/groups/503388660165279

#vikingsvalhalla

description:
Welcome to GXY 75!

A small endurance ride just long enough to count but short enough to not break up your day too much!

Jump on, settle in and respect the leader’s pace, instructions and the time will fly by!

GXY are blessed with a superb sweeping team , if you need a wheel at any point, shout early and our sweepers will be on hand to support.

GXY are a friendly and supportive club who strive to help others succeed. We are looking forward to riding with you.

If you want to become a member and join our community to race, ride socially, or both, please come and join ideally via our Facebook link or by the email below:

name: TNP Chain Gang: No Passengers
description:
This is not a race. This is a chain gang.			
Ride together and hold a steady pace. Take turns on the front, keep the group rolling, and hold the wheel as long as you can.			
We’ll be using the Cadex Tri (draft enabled) while building kms towards bike upgrades.			
Two pace groups:			
👉 Group E (steady) sets off first			
👉 Group A (faster) sets off 5 minutes later			
Go to the front. Take your turn. No passengers.

name: Stage 4 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!


Stage 4
Route: Sand and Sequoias
Date: April 6-12

Wrap up the Zwift Big Spin down on Sand and Sequoias, with loads of prizes still on deck!

name: EVO CC Fusion Endurance Ride! [2.2-2.4w/kg avg]
description:
Welcome to the Evolution Cycling Club [EVO] Fusion Endurance Ride. The ride is geared towards Zwifter’s that are looking for a steady paced ride within a friendly group ride setting, like a coffee ride. The average for the ride will be between 2.2-2.4w/kg depending on riders weight, course and leader. The ride course may vary and at times may include more hillier rides therefore the watts per kilo may be above/below the advertised figures as they are only an average.

The group is based upon high social interaction so bring your best banter. Please use the companion app or a keyboard to communicate in-ride.

eventSubgroups.name: EVO CC Fusion Endurance Ride! [2.2-2.4w/kg avg] (D)

name: Velos Sofa to Saddle ride.
description:
Welcome to Team Velos, this is a gentle ride aimed at newcomers or novice cyclists who are starting out on their Zwift journey. We will start off at .8 w/kg and we will very gradually raise the pace to 1.3 w/kg maximum over the 45 minutes. Our Team will answer any questions you have regarding your Zwift set up and guide you through the wonderful worlds of Zwift. The ride will hopefully give you the encouragement to leave that comfy sofa and build your strength to join our faster rides in the future, our team will encourage you and help with every pedal stroke to reach your goal.

It’s not a race and there is nothing to win here just the satisfaction of getting off the sofa early on a Saturday morning and then you can get on with your weekend.

Join our Zwift club at teamvelos.co.uk

name: Grand Masters League
description:
Welcome to the Grand Masters League! Join passionate cyclists from around the world in this race series designed specifically for competitors of all ages. Each week, we will take on challenging courses in different Zwift worlds, testing your endurance, strategy, and speed.

Rules and Race Format
To ensure fair competition and an epic racing experience, these are the rules you must follow:

Riders will be grouped into age categories to ensure balanced and fair competition:

>     Elite (Cat A) → Up to 29 years old
>     M30 (Cat B) → 30 to 39 years old
>     M40 (Cat C) → 40 to 49 years old
>     M50 (Cat D) → 50 to 59 years old
>     M60+ (Cat E) → 60 years old and up

To appear in the official results on ZwiftPower, it is mandatory to:

Be registered on ZwiftPower.
Use a heart rate monitor (HRM).
Connect a smart trainer or power meter as a power source. (Dual recording is encouraged).

Make sure you meet all requirements to avoid disqualification.

eventSubgroups.name: Elite (Cat A) → Up to 29 years old
M60+ (Cat E) → 60 years old and up

name: LA GRUPETTA DE ZABI
description:
🚴‍♂️ ¡Rodamos juntos para disfrutar!

Únete a la GRUPETTA de ZABI, pensada para compartir kilómetros, risas y buen ambiente sobre la bici.

🔸 Goma activada para mantener al grupo unido
🔸 Ritmo cómodo y accesible para todos
🔸 Ideal para conocer gente y rodar en compañía

No importa tu nivel ni tus vatios. Aquí lo importante es el compañerismo, la diversión y disfrutar del ciclismo virtual juntos.

💪 Ponte el maillot, conecta el rodillo y ven a rodar con nosotros.

¡Todos juntos desde la salida hasta la meta!

🚴‍♂️ Let’s ride together and have fun!

Join this ZABI group ride created to share kilometers, good vibes, and an enjoyable cycling experience.

🔸 Rubber band enabled to keep the group together
🔸 Comfortable and inclusive pace
🔸 Perfect for meeting new riders and riding together

Your level or watts don’t matter. What matters here is friendship, fun, and enjoying virtual cycling as a group.

💪 Put on your kit, connect your trainer, and ride with us.

Let’s stay together from start to finish!

name: ZWIFT NL Longer Ride
description:
Welcome to the Zwift NL Longer ride.

Dit is een groepsrit met de focus op bij elkaar blijven. Luister naar de aanwijzingen van de Yellow Beacon en geniet van de chat…
De snelheid van de rit kan variëren maar gemiddeld rijdt
E 1.8 w/kg
D 2.2 w/kg
C 2.7w/kg…

We wachten op elkaar na sprints en klimmetjes…
————————————————

This is a group ride with the focus on remaining together. Listen to the Yellow Beacon and join in the banter.

The pace can vary during the ride but will have a average pace
1.8 w/kg for E
2.2 w/kg for D
2.7w/kg for C
We will regroup after sprints and climbs..

Check Zwift Nederland also on Facebook
https://instagram.com/zwiftnederland
https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftnederland/
#zwiftnl

name: NO LIMIT CC – SOCIAL - RUBBER BAND & ROLL
description:
👥 No Limit Cycling Club is a community-led cycling club built around consistency, confidence, and riding together. Riders of all backgrounds and abilities are welcome.

🌤 Rubber Band & Roll is a relaxed weekend group ride using Zwift’s Rubber Band feature to help keep the group together. Ride steady with the pack, sit in the draft, or take short pulls knowing the group will regroup. The focus is smooth group riding and good vibes.

🗺 Routes rotate across Zwift worlds including Watopia, France, and Makuri Islands to keep rides fresh and fun.

🧭 Ride leads manage pacing and communication. Sweepers check in with riders and help regroup when needed.

🔒Warm-up around 1.5 w/kg, then settle into 1.8–2.2 w/kg. Fence is on to keep the group together and may be lifted during sprints and towards the end.

🎽 Ride with NLCC to unlock and wear the official No Limit CC Zwift kit.

🔁 Other NLCC rides
Tue 7:00 PM GMT
Thu 7:00 PM GMT
Sat 7:00 AM GMT

📲 Contact
NLCC on Zwift: https://www.zwift.com/clubs/469e53e5-462c-4aa7-b34c-026384533c0b/home
Strava: https://strava.app.link/Vq02OaxrDZb
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nolimit.bike

name: Watts More Rendurance!
description:
Watts More! Ride with friends in challenging events. Take on your challenge in Watts, elevation or duration!

 

Saturday morning, an endurance ride is the ideal way to start your weekend. We ride together in a steady ride at about 2.4 w/kg AVG on mostly flat tracks.
Ride leaders vary and will cheer you on during this ride that will take exact two hours. All riders are encouraged to keep the bunch together, so we can start and finish as one happy blob.
Everybody is welcome as long as you make a positive contribution in making this a good and relaxed start of the weekend.

 

From October until March these rides are guided with a rideleader. From April until September most rides are without rideleader. In that case don’t argue, blob up and be nice.

 

Check out our weekly ride announcements on the Watts More Facebook https://www.facebook.com/groups/1151203888657006/?ref=share

 

Join Watts More on Zwift https://www.zwift.com/clubs/d6afeaa7-e754-478a-b68d-2a794648fa02/home

 

More Watts More events:
To the top! (C) 2.5-3.0 W/kg, Sunday 9.00 AM CET
Build more Watts! (C) 2.5-3.0 W/kg, Tuesday 19.00 CET
Different Watts! (D) 2.2-2.4 W/kg, Thursday 19.00 CET

name: PAOLO BARBERA & SCANNELLATORI SERIALI WORKOUT
description:
"Scannellatori Seriali" is a large community of cyclists, triathletes, and runners. We invite you to join our community by following our Instagram page at https://www.instagram.com/scannellatori_seriali/ or contacting us on Facebook.
 
Coach Paolo Barbera (Please visit www.heycoach.it )   is a Certified Triathlon and Ironman Coach and the founder of Active Kids, a sporting clinic to help children and adults in the prevention and treatment of obesity through healty nutrition and tailored training programs

Paolo is an experienced thriathlete and cyclist, in 2017 opened an endurance training center in milan, Tri60, specilized in indoor training.

In the last ten years Paolo has developed training programs for triathletes, runners and cyclists. Indoor training plays a key role to control pace, cadence and mental strenght.

Paolo’s workouts are designed to mix different training zones aiming to maximize results in a very short time. Paolo’s coachees by following his workouts, at the right intensity, have achieved challenging results.

name: Het is Koers Endurance Recovery Ride!
description:
Het is Koers, the famous Dutch cycling blog presents you a variety of social rides. At Saturday morning we ride together in a steady recovery ride at about 2.4 w/kg AVG on mostly flat tracks with low altimeters.
Ride leaders vary and will cheer you on during this ride that will take exact two hours. All riders are encouraged to keep the bunch together, so we can start and finish as one happy blob.
Everybody is welcome as long as you make a positive contribution in making this a good and relaxed start of the weekend. Please have a nice chat and ride, and do share your beers/drinks after the ride on our HIK Facebook Group page.

These rides will be guided between 1st Sunday of October until the last Sunday of March. From 1st Sunday of April until last Sunday of September they are scheduled a free ride (no lead).
Check out our weekly ride announcements on the HIK Facebook https://www.facebook.com/groups/hetiskoers
Join Het Is Koers on Zwift https://www.zwift.com/clubs/HetIsKoers/home

Other HIK events:
In the Dutch Mountains (C) 2.5-3.0 W/kg, Sunday 9.00 AM CET
Watts More! (C) 2.5-3.0 W/kg, Tuesday 19.00 CET
Something Different! (D) 2.2-2.3 W/kg, Thursday 19.15 CET
Weekend Starter! (D) 1.7-2.2 W/kg and (C) 2.3-2.8 W/kg, Friday 19.30 CET

name: Team Italy Saturday Run
description:
Welcome All Runners.. Here we are, it s Saturday and a good run it s the best way to start the weekend.
Run at your own pace and remember to check on us on Facebook as Zwift Running Italy (Running division of Team Italy Cycling Club) and on Telegram as Team Italy.
#TeamItaly #Run

name: Zwift Epic Race - Petit Boucle
description:
Join us as we take on some slightly more challenging race routes!

For more Epic Races, please join the club on the Companion App: https://www.zwift.com/clubs/a1ea0324-7f4a-46a7-8547-a7a3246e349b/home

All racers will start together, so make sure you're ready at the start!

WHAT IS ZWIFTPOWER? 
For further information on connecting to ZwiftPower, check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note: For your results to show up in ZwiftPower, you must use a heart rate monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter. 

Check out zwift.com/racing for more information on how you can participate in other events offered by Zwift and the community to have a great racing experience.

#zwiftofficial

name: Workout 1 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 1: Foundations
This workout reinforces “calm control” with mostly steady work, then finishes by sharpening leg speed so you can stay smooth at any cadence.

name: Workout 5: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp
description:
The Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp is where the pros put in the work, and this year, you’re invited to join them. Across five weeks of structured training, plus a make-up week, you’ll ride alongside the team on Zwift—sprinting with Jasper Philipsen and Kaden Groves, building endurance with Mathieu van der Poel, and learning from head coach Kristof De Kegel. Don't miss your chance to be a part of the structure, science, and team energy that fuels the WorldTour.

Workout 5: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp

This final session brings it all together. Two long tempo efforts build strong, sustainable endurance and reward the work you’ve done. Settle into a steady rhythm, stay composed, and finish the Alpecin–Premier Tech Training Camp strong!

name: Coffee Lovers Roasting Beans
description:
Welcome to the Roasting Beans. Where the watts are warm and the chat is smooth.

Coffee Lovers brings you a 60-minute roll at 1.8 - 2.2 w/kg - the Roasting Beans, the ride with the right amount of kick. 

New to group rides? You’re more than welcome. All we ask: stay behind the fence, bring your best banter, and maybe a croissant or two. 

It’s the roast you actually want to be part of.

name: Stanga Racing Saturday Classic
description:
One lap. No reset. Stanga Racing Saturday Classic brings classic-style racing to Zwift: control, attacks, selections, and a hard run-in to the line. Survive the key moments, commit at the right time, and finish it off like a pro.

Clean racing, strong legs.
Like this format? Join the Stanga Racing club on Zwift for our full weekly schedule of crits, punchy races, and endurance rides.

https://www.zwift.com/clubs/12f0e125-1fb8-4d78-8da2-b39efca4bffb/home

name: Stage 1: Pas Racing: Jungle Circuit
description:
The PAS Racing Gravel Series brings the spirit and style of Pas Normal Studios to gravel racing on Zwift. Across four stages, you’ll take on demanding routes in a series designed to be raced flat out. Get a shiny new gravel bike from the Drop Shop and let it rip!

Complete any stage to win a brand new Pas Normal Jersey!

Badges are out—XP is in. Every finish fuels your progress. Earn up to 2000 XP for completing the series, including a massive 1000 XP from Stage One.

Stage 1
Route: Jungle Circuit
Date: April 6–12

The series kicks off on the Jungle Circuit in Watopia.. Line up, find your rhythm, and open the PAS Racing Series strong.

Stage 2
Route: Handful of Gravel
Date: April 13–19

The challenge builds. Handful of Gravel rewards the right setup and steady power across demanding terrain. Upgrade your build, join the next start line, and keep the momentum rolling.

Stage 3
Route: Yumezi Grit
Date: April 20–26

A brand new gravel racing route on Zwift. Fresh terrain. New lines to chase. Take on Yumezi Grit, test yourself against the field, and experience competitive gravel at its best.

Stage 4
Route: Serpentine 8
Date: April 27 – May 3

One final chance to line up and close out the PAS Racing Series. Hard routes. Real racing. Finish it strong.

MONTHLY GC COMPETITION

Looking for extra motivation? The Monthly GC (General Classification) Competition lets you track your progress across all stages. Each race counts—your times add up throughout the series, shaping the overall standings. At the end of the month, the fastest total time takes the win!
VIEW RESULTS: https://www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/pasracing2026

—------------------

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that in order to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

description:
Le mode élastique favorise la cohésion au sein du groupe, permettant à chacun d’exprimer pleinement ses compétences. Ainsi, les défis ne deviennent plus des obstacles, mais plutôt des occasions de partage convivial et de plaisir collectif, transformant l’effort en une expérience enrichissante.

Discutez sur Discord /  Discuss on Discord: https://discord.gg/HgFb6SThT
Notre Facebook: https://m.facebook.com/groups/907351331715445

"Please add “(Gang)” at the end of your username in your Zwift profile.   Merci de mettre (Gang) à la fin de votre pseudo dans votre profil zwift 
"
Ruberband mode encourages group cohesion, allowing everyone to fully express their abilities.      Challenges are no longer obstacles, but opportunities for friendly sharing and collective enjoyment, turning effort into a truly rewarding experience.

name: Run In The Park
description:
Come and join the original Zwift group run! 

This event is a 5km mass start event and runs at multiple times every Saturday.  

It is open to runners of all abilities so whether you are a recreational runner or an elite athlete you are welcome on the start line.  

Get to the start gates early to chat with the other runners, you may find someone of a similar ability to group up with for the run.  

There is no time limit for completing the event so run at your own pace and enjoy the course.

name: Team RWB - The Antisocial Chase Ride
description:
An Antisocial Endurance ride where riders are encouraged (but not required) to take turns on front.

High paced endurance ride for A/B riders and C/D. Ride is on TT bikes with double draft enabled.

The C group will start 1st with the A group’s chasing our wheel. The C group will be a steady ride likely averaging 2.6-2.8wkg. in the A group whilst riders are encouraged to take pulls at 4.5 to 5.5 wkg, it is not mandatory. Riders are also welcome to just surf the pack

This is likely an antisocial ride 🤣

Discord link:
https://discord.gg/hXJA3FQWK

name: Cappuccino Ride
description:
Soyez les bienvenu(e)s dans le ride du club BIKES (tag : BIKES)
Une balade tranquille pour tous, suivez les leaders ou trouvez un compagnon de route à votre niveau et roulez ensemble en mode cool. Idéalement Zone2-Zone3
Rejoignez-nous ! ajoute le tag BIKES à ton pseudo Zwift et rejoins le club BIKES FRANCE
sur Companion

Discutez sur Discord: https://discord.gg/a8wYvgw
Notre Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/ZwiftBikes

English spoken!
The idea is to bring together riders from all over the world, no matter where you come from, no matter your level, no matter if you are already in a club or not; just have fun!

A leisurely ride for everyone, follow the leaders or find a companion at your level, and ride together in a relaxed mode. Ideally, Z  one 2-Zone 3

name: Foudre Saturday Coffee Ride
description:
Sortie bla-bla du Samedi Foudre : Foudre Saturday Coffee Ride

INTRO
La Team Foudre vous propose de venir faire une sortie tranquille ensemble, blabla, récup, déblocage d'avant Cyclo, etc.
Venez passer un moment ensemble pour peaufiner votre endurance, et éventuellement vous amuser lors des sprints pour les plus valeureux. 
Il s’agit d’une sortie de groupe conviviale et non d’une course, n’hésitez pas à venir nous rejoindre sur le canal vocal général sur le Discord.
Cette sortie vous permettra également de débloquer le maillot Foudre dans votre garage Zwift.

DETAILS
Durée : 1h30 mais vous pourrez poursuivre et boucler le parcours si vous n’avez encore débloqué le badge du parcours
Join-Late : Activé
Déblocage du maillot Foudre : Oui, à condition d'être toujours dans l'évènement lorsque celui-ci se termine

GROUPES
2 groupes de niveau :
- LEADER (jaune) environ 2,5 w/kg (2,5 à 3,0 dans les montées)
- SWEEPER (rouge) environ 2,2 w/kg. (2,5 à 3,0 dans les montées) »


Pour profiter au maximum de la sortie, rejoins nous sur le discord Foudre et notamment sur l'audio via l'oreillette : https://discord.gg/YzcVYJY

#TeamFoudre #jerseyunlock

name: Zwift TT Club Racing - Glasgow Reverse
description:
The Time Trial. Cycling’s true leveler - just you and your legs versus everyone else in the field.

Come join Zwift TT Club on Zwift for more Time Trial event information! https://www.zwift.com/clubs/b3d1a903-df49-44eb-9c6f-4ba9f0622efe/home

Join us as we embark on a five-week series of events - each week you will have multiple chances to set your best time on the same route!

Over the course of the five weeks, we’ll be increasing the distance of the events.

Check out Zwiftpower.com after your event to see how well you stack up against the competition!

Don’t forget to check you’re using the fastest bike frame and wheels available to you!

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? 
For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: LA MARCHA HISPANA (Enable Rubberbanding)
description:
Un Hispano nunca rodará solo.
No hay distancia que no se pueda recorrer, ni meta que no se pueda alcanzar, si se rueda en buena compañía junto a ciclistas de todo el mundo.
¿Te vienes de paseo?
Telegram: https://t.me/HISPCLUB
Discord: https://discord.gg/c7wSyv8UGR
Únete a nosotros: https://hispclub.es
Compartiremos audio en Discord, canal Social (se informa de la emisión video/audio directo en redes sociales, la participación conlleva su aceptación).

¡Hispano, you’ll never ride alone!
There’s no distance long enough, there’s no challenge though enough, if you roll next to friends and zwifters from around the globe.
Ready for a ride with us?

name: In the Zone 2 with DZR
description:
🚴‍♂️Join the Movement and Get In The Zone 2 with DZR🚴‍♂️

It's time to work smarter, not harder, to build your endurance. Zone 2 training targets the sweet spot of aerobic exercise intensity, where you enhance your capacity to burn fat, clear lactate, and ignite new mitochondria – the powerhouses of your cells fueling energy production.

Bid farewell to pushing too hard in a group ride or risking total burnout in a race. The structured workouts are tailored for zone 2 training, eliminating guesswork and overexertion. Open to all levels, our rubberbanded sessions ensure everyone stays together, delivering smart, effective results.

In the Zone 2 with DZR: Sustain without the strain.

More from DZR on our website: www.dzrracingseries.com

name: Mountain Massif - The Race
description:
The biggest spectacles in bike racing involve mountains. This race is designed to create moments to remember.

This race will see you navigating changing course before reaching the slopes and racing up the mountain to the finish.

This event is designed to hone your race craft, ensuring you save enough energy so you can go full throttle on the mountain climb, battling fellow racers, shoulder to shoulder for the victory. This is the chance to push yourself beyond your perceived limits and reach new heights.

Rules: 
Heart Rate monitor required and Zwift Power for official results, winner of each category. 


More information:
For more information check out the Mountain Massif website www.mountainmassif.com, follow on Instagram, Mountain_Massif and join our Zwift Club, by clicking the link below
https://www.zwift.com/clubs/b639575d-930f-4de6-a79d-bea3313350bc/join

name: ZLDR Weekly Run
description:
Welcome to the ZLDR 21.1k Weekly Long Run. ZLDR is a group of diverse runners, from speed demons to walkers, from people just getting to their first 5k to ultra runners. We are here to support your running dreams and help you develop your running skills. We are a collective group of supportive and experienced runners who will do our best to help you reach your goals.

Whether you’re speeding across the roads of Watopia or taking a gentle jog, join us for whatever distance but keep joining us and we can help you get to 21.1k and beyond. It’s always easier to run with others.

As with any of our runs, you are not required to go the entire distance listed. But we are a distance running group and would like to offer our members a chance every week to put their legs to the test and see how far they can go.

For more ZLDR fun and support, join our groups on social media platforms:

Facebook group:
https://www.facebook.com/groups/ZLDR2020
Instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/zldr.2020/
Strava:
https://www.strava.com/clubs/zldr2020
Discord Invitation (not required for the run)
https://discord.com/invite/PuFctEnWyn

name: Stage 4 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!


Stage 4
Route: Sand and Sequoias
Date: April 6-12

Wrap up the Zwift Big Spin down on Sand and Sequoias, with loads of prizes still on deck!

name: WKG SATURDAY SUPERSTYLIN'
description:
Join us for a chilled weekend ride. SUPERSTYLIN is all about having fun while we spin. 



We will attack the Sprints and KQOMs as we maintain a 2/2.3 wkg average. There will be a quiz most weeks and a ride Spotify playlist. 



The WKG  crew like a good laugh, so your dad jokes are most welcome.  



Check out our WKG Racing League and WKG on Facebook, 

also feel free to join our Zwift Club.



WKG Zwift Club 

https://www.zwift.com/clubs/WKG/home

Facebook Page

name: Zwift Crit Racing Club - Glasgow Reverse
description:
It's Crit time! Come and join in the fun on a number of multi-lap short routes. Get ready to dig deep and push to the finish line!

What is Racing Score?

Racing Score is an intuitive system that replaces the traditional categories (A - D) with a 0-1000 scale to reflect your current level, considering various metrics like race performances and power. This score helps Zwift recommend the most competitive band to race in, ensuring a fun, rewarding, and exciting experience as you track your progression throughout your Zwift racing adventures.

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: Team CLS Base 'n' Banter
description:
Base ’n’ Banter is a controlled weekend endurance ride - with a strong community and social focus! 

Across every weekend in 2026, we will continue to offer a mix of rides that cover flat, rolling and hilly terrain with the aim of getting in a solid endurance ride, mostly around 2hrs.

This is a chance to enjoy a friendly experienced group club ride with regulars who have no Big Egos. While you build your fitness, there is always plenty of in-ride banter. 

What pace to expect?
We will ride the flats around 2.5 - 2.7 w/kg with a focus on keeping everyone together!

The leader will climb at around 3.0 - 3.2 w/kg depending on the length and if needed we will always try and regroup after.

While the leader will do everything to keep everyone together, we can't slow repeatedly so some splits are inevitable.

Our SWEEPERS on this ride, known as our ‘ORANGE ARMY’ (OA), are members of TEAM CLS who are dedicated to helping others. If you have had a drop out or accidentally hit a wrong key, type ‘HELP’ and they will come back and offer you a wheel back to the group.

Note: While we always try to ensure this ride is led by one of our beacons there may be some weeks where this is not possible. The ride always has regulars that will ride to the advertised pace!


WEEKLY PROGRAM
Mon  18:50 UK - Team CLS Racing - Pace ‘n’ Race: Recon and Activation 
Tues 18:50 UK - This ‘n’ That - Endurance Training
Wed  18:50 UK - Ride ‘n’ Explore Club Rideout
Thur 18:50 UK - High ‘n’ Low - Interval Training
Sat  08:50 and 14:45 UK - Base ‘n’ Banter Endurance ride
Sun  18:50 UK - Chill 'n' Spin - Weekend Social



TEAM CLS LINKS
Check out www.teamclscc.co.uk ...find out about our club, current events and leaders. 

Facebook Club Site - https://www.facebook.com/groups/teamclscc
Facebook Racing Site - https://www.facebook.com/groups/teamclsracing
Zwift Power Team - https://www.zwiftpower.com/team.php?id=1426



TEAM | CLS - Training | Racing | Community

name: INC Relentless Endurance Long Distance Ride
description:
Join Innovation Cycling for an endurance ride with Hills, thrills and cogs of steel! This ride is aimed at anyone looking for repeated efforts as found in some of the famous Fondos and races around the world. So if you are prepping for Majorca 312, 225, or 167, or indeed any other Grand Fondo, join us and get some distance and hills in your legs.

This is your ride as much as the groups, if you want to go off the front, feel free to see how long you can stay away, if you want to hit some sprints, get stuck in. This ride is your opportunity to focus not just on the effort and training required to be your best but also to test nutrition and race strategies.

Feel free to chat about bike choice, fuelling, strategy, hotels, pubs, karaoke and anything else you like.

Innovation organise training rides daily and all are welcome. These rides are designed to push you further than before, come along and take your turn on the front, or surf the draft in comfort.

eventSubgroups.name: INC Relentless Endurance Long Distance Ride (B)

name: Rebellunas Running Group
description:
Welcome, runners! 
A relaxed Saturday run is the perfect start to the weekend. Run at your own pace and have fun!

name: ✈️ Team Saddle Jets: Weekend Flight Ops
description:
✈️ Welcome aboard Team Saddle Jets: Flight Ops Saturday—a disciplined,
high-tempo endurance ride designed for strong Zwifters who thrive at altitude.
We hold a steady 2.0 to 2.5 W/kg across a full 100km course, keeping the group
tight, fast, and focused.

Expect a consistent tempo from start to finish—this isn’t a social ride, and
there’s no sweep. Riders are encouraged to hold the leader’s pace and stay in
formation. It’s not a race, but fall off the back and you’re flying solo.

If you’re training for high-performance fondos, building endurance at race pace,
or just want a serious weekend workout with structure and attitude—this is your
ride.

eventSubgroups.name: ✈️ Team Saddle Jets: Weekend Flight Ops

name: Run 10K Every Day Powered By NoblePro
description:
Come and join the longest running daily led running event on Zwift. This was the event that kickstarted the NoblePro Running Club in support of a world record attempt at consecutive daily10k runs.
The event has a healthy group of leaders who are friendly and chatty and will help you achieve your goal, not matter your experience. Feel free to join in the chat and become addicted like we all are.

Whether you are a beginner or experienced runner come and join us, you can run at whatever pace you like, it's not a race.
If you don't want to run 10k then come along for as long as you wish, the support is always appreciated.
The event runs at the same time each day, each day of the week there is a different course.

NoblePro: - We are a team focused on elevating running through our treadmills and digital platforms. We create treadmills loved by runners and the wider running community for quality engineered hardware features and advanced software integration to give you the freedom to train with the apps you love.
https://www.noble-pro.com/

Kinni:- In a fitness world where treadmill bluetooth integration can be a confusing place, we aim to provide you with the ability to effortlessly connect. You can run structured treadmill workouts, connect and integrate with your favourite bluetooth fitness apps such as Zwift, Rouvy, Kinomaps and many more. We are focused on progress and advancement in integration, connectivity and control.
https://kinni.co/

https://kinni.co/devices/ - To see if your treadmill is compatible to link to Zwift.

Join the NoblePro Running Club (NPRC) - https://www.zwift.com/clubs/e7829ccd-bce4-4244-9ccf-4cdc3ef148ff/home

name: ZTPL Cycling Club Group Workout with RatajCyclistCoach
description:
☀️Weszliśmy w sezon wiosenno-letni.☀️
Część naszych eventów zostaje w kalendarzu, ale może zdarzyć się tak że nie będzie na nich naszych liderów jazd.
Jeśli tak się zdarzy, gorąca prośba do Was o jazdę wg. założeń danego eventu.
Nasze eventy i liderzy ZTPL Cycling Club wrócą ponownie na jesień 2026.
Póki co RIDE ON i korzystajcie z pogody, a jeśli nie możecie to bawcie się dobrze podczas naszych eventów.

ZTPL Cycling Club wspólnie z www.instagram.com/ratajcyclistcoach/ zaprasza na cykliczny trening grupowy. Tym razem przygotowaliśmy dla Was trzy grupy, które będą oferowały różne rodzaje treningu:
Grupa A: Trening na Siłę
Grupa B: Powtórzenia Over and Under
Grupa C: Specjalny protokół mający na celu wprowadzenie do naszego sobotniego Pucharu ZTPL

Nasza jazda odbywać się będzie w formie #GroupWorkout co oznacza, że wszyscy jedziemy razem niezależnie od poziomu wytrenowania!
Po ukończonym evencie, jeśli jechaliście z nami pierwszy raz, w Waszym wirtualnym garażu będzie czekała nasza teamowa koszulka!

*Ważne! Podczas treningu grupowego każdy z uczestników wykonuje te same bloki treningowe oparte na indywidualnym poziomie FTP wpisanym w swoim profilu. Ta formuła jazdy pozwala wykonać tez sam trening osobom na różnych poziomach jednocześnie jadąc w tej samej grupie.
Więcej o treningach na Zwift znajdziecie na naszej stronie https://ztpl.cc/treningi-na-zwift/ lub na stronie Zwifta https://www.zwift.com/eu-de/news/20036-zwift-training-plans

[ENG]

☀️We’re now in the spring and summer season.☀️
Some of our events will stay in the calendar, but there may be times when our ride leaders won’t be there. If that happens, we’d really appreciate it if you could still ride according to the plan of the event.
Our ZTPL Cycling Club events will be back in autumn 2026.
For now — RIDE ON, enjoy the good weather, and if you can’t, just have a great time at our events.

ZTPL Cycling Club, together with www.instagram.com/ratajcyclistcoach, invites you to a recurring group training session.
This time, we’ve prepared three groups offering different types of training:
Group A: Strength Training
Group B: Over and Under Intervals
Group C: A special protocol designed as an introduction to our Saturday Race
This event is a #GroupWorkout so we’ll work together!
*Important! During group training, each participant performs the same training blocks based on the individual FTP level entered in their profile. This driving formula also allows people of different levels to do the same training while riding in the same group.

◾️If you would like to get yourself our ZTPL Cycling Club team jersey please visit our shop https://inoni.cc/en/?s=ztpl&post_type=product
or you can order our Casual T-Shirt and Hoodies https://wintertal.com/en/133-ztplcc

name: Workout 1 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 1: Foundations
This workout reinforces “calm control” with mostly steady work, then finishes by sharpening leg speed so you can stay smooth at any cadence.

name: MSR | Winter Season Ends Ride
description:
Hey Leute. 
Willkommen in der MSR-Community.

Events:

➕Donnerstag 19 Uhr - Workout

Leader:

Sweeper

Wir starten alle zusammen in einem moderaten Tempo mit max 1,5W/kg.

Ihr könnt euch also einen Leader aussuchen. Wenn es zu schnell oder langsam sein sollte könnt ihr euch auf dem Rundkurs immer wieder zurückfallen lassen und mit der anderen Gruppe fahren.

Ride on!

name: Stage 1: Pas Racing: Jungle Circuit
description:
The PAS Racing Gravel Series brings the spirit and style of Pas Normal Studios to gravel racing on Zwift. Across four stages, you’ll take on demanding routes in a series designed to be raced flat out. Get a shiny new gravel bike from the Drop Shop and let it rip!

Complete any stage to win a brand new Pas Normal Jersey!

Badges are out—XP is in. Every finish fuels your progress. Earn up to 2000 XP for completing the series, including a massive 1000 XP from Stage One.

Stage 1
Route: Jungle Circuit
Date: April 6–12

The series kicks off on the Jungle Circuit in Watopia.. Line up, find your rhythm, and open the PAS Racing Series strong.

Stage 2
Route: Handful of Gravel
Date: April 13–19

The challenge builds. Handful of Gravel rewards the right setup and steady power across demanding terrain. Upgrade your build, join the next start line, and keep the momentum rolling.

Stage 3
Route: Yumezi Grit
Date: April 20–26

A brand new gravel racing route on Zwift. Fresh terrain. New lines to chase. Take on Yumezi Grit, test yourself against the field, and experience competitive gravel at its best.

Stage 4
Route: Serpentine 8
Date: April 27 – May 3

One final chance to line up and close out the PAS Racing Series. Hard routes. Real racing. Finish it strong.

MONTHLY GC COMPETITION

Looking for extra motivation? The Monthly GC (General Classification) Competition lets you track your progress across all stages. Each race counts—your times add up throughout the series, shaping the overall standings. At the end of the month, the fastest total time takes the win!
VIEW RESULTS: https://www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/pasracing2026

—------------------

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that in order to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

name: GXY ~ MONTHLY MADNESS [1.6-2.5 W/KG] – CAT D
description:
Looking for a ride that's part badge hunt, part group therapy, and 100% fun?

Welcome to GXY Monthly Madness a friendly suffering event!. A once a month gathering of mad minds and strong
legs hosted by Morten and Ju (plus a squirrel or two)!

We take on Zwift's toughest routes with one rule……no suffering alone! Sometimes it is a banded ride, other times it
is not. It depends on the route, the vibe and the moon phase…..BUT the goal is always the same…..ride together,
collect badges and laugh through the climbs.

Expect steady pace and supportive leaders, rare badge unlocks, bad jokes, purple vibes and motivational nonsense.
Open to all levels, just bring snacks drinks and a good attitude. Come climb with us, you might forget the pain but not
the people.

Remember to ride long, stay strong, laugh often!

GXY are a friendly and supportive club who strive to help others succeed their goals.

Our Club emphasis is based on inclusivity, diversity, respect and providing fun at all levels on Zwift whether riding
socially, racing your legs off or hanging around our optional chat groups waiting for our IRL meet ups!
We are of course looking forward to riding with you.

If you want to become a member and join our community to race, ride socially, or both, please come and join ideally
via our Facebook link:

https://www.facebook.com/groups/galaxycyclingclub/
https://www.strava.com/clubs/989894
https://www.instagram.com/galaxycyclingclub

name: The Saturday 100-Miller (160km)
description:
Aiming to become your new Saturday ritual. A consistent, weekly event to tackle the classic 100-mile (160km) distance together.

🇬🇧 Join the CLUB: Randonnée Project 🎯✨

Event with DOUBLE DRAFT enabled! 🚴‍♂️💨💨

Ride with us for 100 miles (160 km). No one will be held back by barriers – just use the double draft (special feature) to go faster in a group with one of the leaders. It will be a memorable ride! Are you ready?

-> We’re looking for more leaders! 👑🚴‍♂️

__________________________________________

🇮🇹 Unisciti al CLUB: Randonnée Project 🎯✨

Evento con DOPPIA SCIA attiva! 🚴‍♂️💨💨

Pedala con noi per 100 miglia (160 km). Nessuno verrà frenato da barriere, ma potrai sfruttare la doppia scia (funzione speciale) per andare più forte in gruppo con uno dei leader. Sarà una pedalata memorabile! Sei pronto?

-> Cerchiamo altri leader! 👑🚴‍♂️

__________________________________________

🇫🇷 Rejoins le CLUB : Randonnée Project 🎯✨

Événement avec DOUBLE ASPIRATION activée ! 🚴‍♂️💨💨

Roule avec nous sur 100 miles (160 km). Personne ne sera retenu par des barrières – profite de la double aspiration (fonction spéciale) pour aller plus vite en groupe avec l’un des leaders. Ce sera une sortie mémorable ! Tu es prêt ?

-> Nous recherchons d’autres leaders ! 👑🚴‍♂️

__________________________________________

🇩🇪 Tritt dem CLUB bei: Randonnée Project 🎯✨

Event mit DOPPELTER WINDSCHEATTUNG aktiviert! 🚴‍♂️💨💨

Fahre mit uns 100 Meilen (160 km). Niemand wird durch Barrieren ausgebremst – nutze den doppelten Windschatten (Spezialfunktion), um schneller in der Gruppe mit einem der Leader zu fahren. Wird ein unvergessliche Fahrt! Bist du bereit?

-> Wir suchen weitere Leader! 👑🚴‍♂️

__________________________________________

🇪🇸 Únete al CLUB: Randonnée Project 🎯✨

¡Evento con DOBLE ESTELA activada! 🚴‍♂️💨💨

Pedalea con nosotros 100 millas (160 km). Nadie será frenado por barreras, podrás aprovechar la doble estela (función especial) para ir más rápido en grupo con uno de los líderes. ¡Será una rodada memorable! ¿Estás listo?

-> ¡Buscamos más líderes! 👑🚴‍♂️

name: Mini Little Tour Ghost Team – Etape 1
description:
Mini Little tour tout les semaines - meme Power UP - meme horaire.
* NEW TEXTE*: #MLTGT Pourquoi ne pas pimenter un peu notre calendrier et booster la participation aux événements ? Alors voilà : place au Mini Little Tour ! Un format court, intense, accessible et surtout ultra fun — pile ce qu’on aime tous sur Zwift. Le concept : Toutes les semaine 3 courses enchaînées, Little Tour Ghost Team… mais version express Courses courtes, dynamiques, accessibles à tous L’objectif : du rythme, de la bagarre, du plaisir. Horaire : Course 1 : 10h20 Course 2 : 10h50 Course 3 : 11h25 En 1h top chrono, tout est plié ! Pour être classé au général, il faut participer aux 3 courses à la suite. Barème de points par course : 1e : 100 pts 2e : 97 pts 3e : 94 pts 4e : 92 pts 5e : 90 pts 6e : 88 pts 7e : 86 pts 8e : 84 pts 9e : 82 pts 10e : 80 pts Puis de la 11e place on descend de 1 point par place (jusqu’à 0) En résumé : Nom : Mini Little Tour Fréquence : Tout les samedis matins Durée : 1h – 3 courses de 15 à 20 minutes chacune Objectif : dynamiser la participation, enrichir le classement maillot, et surtout… se faire plaisir ! 🔗 width=22 Lien du prochain Mini Little Tour Ghost Team 👉 width=22
https://www.zwift.com/uk/events/tag/mltgt ou consultez notre https://www.zwifteur.com/ghost-team/calendrier-evenements

Why not spice up our calendar and boost event participation? So here it is: make way for the Mini Little Tour! A short, intense, accessible, and above all, ultra-fun format—exactly what we all love on Zwift.

The Concept: Every week:

3 back-to-back races, Little Tour Ghost Team style… but the express version.

Short, dynamic races, open to everyone.

The Goal: High pace, good battles, and pure fun.

Schedule:

Race 1: 10:20

Race 2: 10:50

Race 3: 11:25

All wrapped up in just 1 hour flat! To be ranked in the General Classification, you must participate in all 3 consecutive races.

Points Scale per Race:

1st: 100 pts

2nd: 97 pts

3rd: 94 pts

4th: 92 pts

5th: 90 pts

6th: 88 pts

7th: 86 pts

8th: 84 pts

9th: 82 pts

10th: 80 pts

Then, from 11th place onwards, points decrease by 1 point per place (down to 0).

In Summary:

Name: Mini Little Tour

Frequency: Every Saturday morning

Duration: 1h – 3 races of 15 to 20 minutes each

Goal: Boost participation, enrich the jersey classification, and above all… have fun!

Link to the next Mini Little Tour Ghost Team: https://www.zwift.com/uk/events/tag/mltgt Or check our calendar: https://www.zwifteur.com/ghost-team/calendrier-evenements

name: ZZRC Bring a Bidon Social Ride
description:
Welcome to our ZZRC Bring a Bidon 2.4-2.7. This is a group ride, not a race, where we encourage riding together.

Our rides are open to all riders, the category enforcement merely allows us to ensure a safe and quality ride for you the riders and for our group.

In 2015 ZZRC was founded and are one of the oldest established clubs on Zwift .

YELLOW BEACON will pace between 2.4-2.7 on the ride , with a possible increase of watts on inclines or sprints , but the average for the whole ride will be as advertised

We strongly promote group riding so on most of our rides we will use the Fence to help encourage that. Using a fence ensures that the ride is not over paced .

In the event of falling off the back of the main group , you will need to pace well over group pace to bridge the gap and catch .

This is where our awesome ZZRC sweeps and Ride Buddies will help you return to group using their draft. They will give you clear encouraging instructions to aid this process .

Our crew are a caring bunch who dedicate a lot of hours to this club , but want you to have the best ride experience on Zwift

You will be fully supported and encouraged throughout the ride by the Leader, Sweeps and Ride Buddies .

Our rides do not allow the use of TT Bikes as they do not draft and will require you to push harder on the ride, and in these instances our Sweeps will not be able to help you .

Mountain bikes operate very similarly, minimum draft so more watts (effort) will be required for the ride and any chase backs to group .

All our rides have a 30 minute late join feature which allows you to rejoin if you have technical issues or you find yourself out of the group in the early stages of the ride. Using this feature SHOULD teleport you back into the main group with our YELLOW BEACON .


We love to have a chat on our rides so join us
on Discord: https://discord.gg/QdeS3PtXTX


TOP TIPS

1) Stay close to the ride leader (or just in front on climbs), don’t let a gap form and the elastic snap!

2) Stay away from the Fence – We don’t like to fry anyone

3) Most important of all . . . HAVE FUN AND ENJOY THE RIDE.

#zzrc

Don’t forget to join our ZZRC-We Pace Not Race Facebook page and our club on the companion app

eventSubgroups.name: ZZRC Bring a Bidon Social Ride (C)

name: PACK🐺 1.5 Saturday Coffee
description:
This PACK 1.5 beginner friendly event is aimed at Zwifters looking for a group ride experience at an average lap pace of around 1.3-1.5w/kg.

On the flat, the pace will be controlled to ensure the group draft effect is kept under tight control with a target of 1.5w/kg on any hills or upslopes. The Leader will text instructions as well as use discord voice chat as communication is the key to a good group ride. Sweepers will also be in operation to assist in helping the group stay together as this is a non-drop ride.

All riders will appear in the same kit and you can optionally add (PACK) after your name to show support of the group. Please respect the pace set by the leader, this is a group ride not a race. #strongertogether

Finally, if you are just starting your zwift experience, please join our facebook group and PACK Club for tips on group riding, friendly advice and to answer any questions you have.

PACK Club:
https://www.zwift.com/clubs/Pack/join

Facebook Group #zwiftpack
https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftpack/

PACK Events:
https://www.zwift.com/events/tag/pack

Discord Voice Chat:
https://discord.gg/cce7ers

Zwiftpower Team:
https://www.zwiftpower.com/team.php?id=2928

name: DBR Saturday Race
description:
Welcome to DBR Saturday Race.

All RS categories will start at the same time. Expect each race to be highly competitive and have fun.

Categories
Each race will be using Zwift Racing Score (ZRS) for categorization.
race up a category, if your RS is at the top end of a category. Or if you simply desire an added challenge.

- A: 1000 =< 690
- B:690<520
- C:520<350
- D:350<180
- E:180<=0

Your Zwift Racing Score is determined by how much success you have in races.
better against people with higher ZRS, then your ZRS may increase. If you place worse than people with lower ZRS, then your score might decrease. Read more about ZRS here - https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh <https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh>

If your ZRS increases past a category boundary during the series, your points earned will not transfer to the new category with you.

RULES:
Smart trainer or power meter is required. zPower will be removed.
Heart rate monitors are compulsory for all categories.
No TT bikes unless it's a TT event.
You need to have a registered account with Zwiftpower.com and accept their terms and conditions to be in the results of the race.

Misc.
Race organizers may request riders in all categories to provide a dual recording or a matching RL effort (Strava) in order to verify a Zwift race effort. Failure to comply may result in disqualification from the event. Failure to provide a dual recording or RL effort on three requests may result in disqualification from future events, until a dual recording with a matching effort is provided.
Race organizers may exclude a rider from the results, due to poor sportsmanship. Examples may be bad language, sandbagging or other behavior of a disruptive manner.

#danishbikeriders

name: UK Armed Forces Boot Camp
description:
UKAFC Boot Camp

UK Armed Forces Cycling invites you to join our weekly Saturday morning Boot Camp.

There are two rides to chose from:

B - eChainGang
Due to good weather, the eChainGang training has now finished for the 20/21 winter season. Thanks for your support over the winter...we will be back in Oct 21 so watch this space...

C - Yomp
Longer group ride with the aim of keeping the group together. Expect average between 2.0-2.6wkg. Keep it social and get some miles done.

Ride On!

facebook.com/ukafcycling

name: Saturday Hand Cycle Ride
description: Join us for a weekly hand cycle group ride every Saturday morning. All riders of all abilities are welcome.

name: Stage 4 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!


Stage 4
Route: Sand and Sequoias
Date: April 6-12

Wrap up the Zwift Big Spin down on Sand and Sequoias, with loads of prizes still on deck!

name: Mini Little Tour Ghost Team – Etape 2
description:
Mini Little tour tout les semaines - meme Power UP - meme horaire.
* NEW TEXTE*: #MLTGT Pourquoi ne pas pimenter un peu notre calendrier et booster la participation aux événements ? Alors voilà : place au Mini Little Tour ! Un format court, intense, accessible et surtout ultra fun — pile ce qu’on aime tous sur Zwift. Le concept : Toutes les semaine 3 courses enchaînées, Little Tour Ghost Team… mais version express Courses courtes, dynamiques, accessibles à tous L’objectif : du rythme, de la bagarre, du plaisir. Horaire : Course 1 : 10h20 Course 2 : 10h50 Course 3 : 11h25 En 1h top chrono, tout est plié ! Pour être classé au général, il faut participer aux 3 courses à la suite. Barème de points par course : 1e : 100 pts 2e : 97 pts 3e : 94 pts 4e : 92 pts 5e : 90 pts 6e : 88 pts 7e : 86 pts 8e : 84 pts 9e : 82 pts 10e : 80 pts Puis de la 11e place on descend de 1 point par place (jusqu’à 0) En résumé : Nom : Mini Little Tour Fréquence : Tout les samedis matins Durée : 1h – 3 courses de 15 à 20 minutes chacune Objectif : dynamiser la participation, enrichir le classement maillot, et surtout… se faire plaisir ! 🔗 width=22 Lien du prochain Mini Little Tour Ghost Team 👉 width=22
https://www.zwift.com/uk/events/tag/mltgt ou consultez notre https://www.zwifteur.com/ghost-team/calendrier-evenements

Why not spice up our calendar and boost event participation? So here it is: make way for the Mini Little Tour! A short, intense, accessible, and above all, ultra-fun format—exactly what we all love on Zwift.

The Concept: Every week:

3 back-to-back races, Little Tour Ghost Team style… but the express version.

Short, dynamic races, open to everyone.

The Goal: High pace, good battles, and pure fun.

Schedule:

Race 1: 10:20

Race 2: 10:50

Race 3: 11:25

All wrapped up in just 1 hour flat! To be ranked in the General Classification, you must participate in all 3 consecutive races.

Points Scale per Race:

1st: 100 pts

2nd: 97 pts

3rd: 94 pts

4th: 92 pts

5th: 90 pts

6th: 88 pts

7th: 86 pts

8th: 84 pts

9th: 82 pts

10th: 80 pts

Then, from 11th place onwards, points decrease by 1 point per place (down to 0).

In Summary:

Name: Mini Little Tour

Frequency: Every Saturday morning

Duration: 1h – 3 races of 15 to 20 minutes each

Goal: Boost participation, enrich the jersey classification, and above all… have fun!

Link to the next Mini Little Tour Ghost Team: https://www.zwift.com/uk/events/tag/mltgt Or check our calendar: https://www.zwifteur.com/ghost-team/calendrier-evenements

name: TugaZ Ride
description:
Este é um evento sem líder, forme um grupo com ciclistas que queiram pedalar ao mesmo ritmo que você e aproveite para completarem o percurso juntos e desfrutarem de todo o efeito social que o Zwift nos traz.

A ideia do passeio é aumentar a sua resistência e capacidade, sempre em boa companhia.

This is a no leader event, form a group with cyclists who want to ride at the same pace as you and take the opportunity to complete the route together and enjoy all the social effect that Zwift brings us.

The idea of ​​the tour is to increase your resistance and capacity, always in good company.

name: TeamPTz - Joaquim Agostinho Ride
description:
Joaquim Agostinho, 1943~1984, ciclista de elite Português. Entre muitas homenagens, sabias que sempre que sobes o ADZ, 14.ª curva do Alpe d'Huez, podes ver o Busto de J.A., em homenagem à sua vitoria desta mítica etapa no Tour em 1979, (na classificação geral terminou em 3º).

Temos todo o gosto em te convidar para te juntares a nós neste passeio de convívio, em homenagem ao J.A.. Deverás pedalar junto do leader e poderás juntar-te a nós no Discord: https://discord.gg/MtBCtBmch8

Joaquim Agostinho, 1943~1984, Top Portuguese cyclist. Among many honors, did you know that whenever you climd ADZ, turn 14º Alpe d’Huez, you can see J.A. statue, in honour to his victory at 1979 on this mitic stage on tour, (finished overall at 3º).

We are glad to invite you to join us in a social ride, that also honours J.A. You should run together with Leader and you can join us on our Discord server: https://discord.gg/MtBCtBmch8

name: Zwift Racing League Recon Ride (Team Evolve)
description:
This ZRL Group Recon Ride is led by Team Evolve (https://www.zwift.com/clubs/96ff10e9-461d-40b1-b62d-24abcacd202f).

Zwift Racing League Group Recon Rides are the official non-competitive Group Rides. Each one is hosted/run by a participating club and will feature racing tips and tricks for the race ahead, an opportunity to ask questions relating to Zwift Racing League and to preview the full course for Tuesday’s ZRL races.

THE AIM
With experienced ride leaders and Zwifters from a reputable Zwift Club, this is your opportunity to ask questions about all things ZRL-related. You'll be able to learn useful course and team tactics and if you are new to ZRL - perhaps even find a team to race with too!

There are multiple Group Recon Rides to choose from each day at various times and each will operate at the advertised paces (pace is based on your Zwift Pace Group).

WHAT IS THE ZRL?
Introducing the spectacular Zwift Racing League (ZRL) - a turbocharged online bike racing extravaganza that's rewriting the rules of competition. With a staggering 180 community divisions, 1,800 electrifying teams, and a whopping 14,000 fierce racers per 6-week round, the ZRL stands as the undisputed heavyweight champion of online bike racing competitions worldwide.

This high-octane spectacle is masterfully orchestrated by our powerhouse partners, WTRL, who leave no stone unturned in delivering an unparalleled racing experience. But remember, this race is an invitation-only affair, so if you dare to join the ranks of speed demons and thrill-seekers, you'll need to hitch a ride with one of the esteemed existing teams. Fear not, though, for WTRL's website (www.WTRL.racing) is your portal to all the insider intel - schedule, rules, and even a team that perfectly aligns with your fiery spirit!

If you want to gather your own team, you register for the next Round of ZRL at www.wtrl.racing/zwift-racing-league/.

#zrlrecon #wtrl #zrl #dirt

eventSubgroups.name: Zwift Racing League Recon Ride (Team Evolve) (E)

eventSeries.name: ZRL 25/26 R4
eventSeries.description: Zwift Racing League Season 20 (2025/26 - Round 4). Includes all races and official recon rides

name: HerD Beginner Races
description:
Where do you go to try racing or to grow a little better with your racing craft… Herd Beginner Races is set up to provide you with that opportunity by using Zwift Racing Scores (ZRS) with bandwidths that are set up so you’re competing with people of similarities and routes that enable you to challenge yourself and grow with racing. Our pens are set up as;

Pen A   ZRS  345-430

Pen B   ZRS 265-345

Pen C   ZRS 185-265

Pen D   ZRS 115-185

Pen E   ZRS 0-115

If you’re new to racing please take Zwift’s recommendation in blue.

Each week HBR races will have a different focus; racing on a flat route, rolling/undulating with a small climbs, and a route that is commonly used in many Zwift racing events. In addition, the last race of the month will be Tick-Tock so that you can monitor your performance.

name: Tiny Race (1 of 4) by Zwift Insider
description:
IMPORTANT: read these notes to perform your best and avoid disqualification!

Tiny Races are mean to be raced as set of 4 back-to-back events that finish within one hour. Each race is on a different route that takes ~7-12 minutes to complete, and races are scheduled 15 minutes apart.

3 RULES:
- No skipping then returning. You will receive a DQ if you skip race 1, 2, or 3 but finish a later race in the set.
- You must have an active ZwiftPower account to compete for the overall podium.
- Smart trainer or power meter is required.

THIS WEEK'S ROUTES:
Race 1: Spirit Forest (3.35km, ends partway up Temple KOM) - Powerup: Steamroller
Race 2: Chasing the Sun (4.42km to Railway Sprint arch) - Powerup: Draft Boost
Race 3: Railways and Rooftops (5.44km ends atop Rooftop KOM Reverse) - Powerup: Feather
Race 4: Turf N Surf (7.55km, ends in slot canyon) - Powerup: Aero Boost

PRO TIPS: 
You will receive a single powerup at the start of each race, as listed above. Be sure to visit https://zwiftinsider.com/tiny/ for details on this week's routes, including custom finish line locations.

RESULTS:
You earn points in each race based on your finishing position. The overall category winners each week (available on ZwiftPower) are the riders with the most points across all 4 races. ZwiftPower result links:
- Zone 1 (10am UTC): https://zwiftpower.com/league.php?id=1172
- Zone 2 (4pm UTC): https://zwiftpower.com/league.php?id=1173
- Zone 3 (10pm UTC): https://zwiftpower.com/league.php?id=1174
