name: LEQP Provence Badge Hunter Series
description:
Welcome to the L’Equipe Provence Badge Hunter Series! Our dedicated Team of Leaders and Sweepers created the concept of Zwift Badge Hunting and continue to refine, expand and perfect the art of the Hunt. Together, we share two goals: stacking badges and having fun! Whether this is your first time with us or you just want to tap into the contagious enthusiasm from a community of like-minded Zwifters, you’re in the right place. As a bonus, finish the Hunt and unlock the L’Equipe Provence Team Kit!

Teamwork makes the dreamwork! Stick together, use the group draft and encourage each other in the chat to get through these challenging rides. Group C will be between 2.5-3.2 w/kg and Group D will be between 2.0-2.5 wkg.

Visit our Team Shop:
https://jakroo.com/store-front?storeId=BJ2aA7Ay5#

Join our Facebook Group: https://www.facebook.com/groups/leqpprovencezwift/

Follow on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/lequipeprovence/

Turn It Up! Add your favorite track to our Spotify Playlist!: https://tinyurl.com/y5ocfckc

Chat on our Discord Channel: https://discord.gg/a8TCFft

#doubledraft #badgehunter #lequipeprovence #kitunlock

name: LGBTQz Ride with Pride
description:
Everyone is welcome to join LGBTQ Zwifters and friends as we Ride with Pride all
year round in our Sunday social ride!
Our yellow beacons aim to maintain an average social pace of around 1.6 - 1.8
W/Kg, and we encourage everyone to ride close to yellow and enjoy being part of
our rainbow blob. Please be aware that we frequently use the rubberband in our group rides. You can check the event details to see if this is the case for this ride by using the link 'Toggle Event Details' at the end of the event description on zwift.com. Ride leaders may have quizzes or other fun
stuff planned for you, so please do get involved using the companion app chat
function. Our rides are inclusive, we value diversity and courage, and we are always
respectful. Ride chat may involve LGBTQIA+ topics so please come with an open
heart and open mind.
If you want to learn more about what to expect on one of our rides, or find links to our
Club and socials, please visit: https://lgbtq-zwifters.com/

name: Hotchillee Race, Ride or Conquer Endurance ride
description:
The Hotchillee Race, Ride or Conquer ride is a series of Sunday morning endurance focussed races/rides that are a perfect way to get in a solid endurance session.

The routes will typically be in the 70-120 mins range but we might throw in some longer ones too.

The idea, just like a good sportive, is, no matter what your pace, you should find some wheels to ride with and, with double-draft enabled, should be able to hang on and tick that route off.

If you want a couple of spicy midweek rides, check out Hotchillee WOT (Watts on Tuesday) on Tuesdays at 1830 and the Hotchillee Gain Train at 1830 on Thursdays.

Check out Hotchillee IRL events and our community at *www.hotchillee.com*

Route Rota

Eastern Eight (51.7km/340m)
Dust in the Wind (52.1km/529m)
Petit Boucle (61km/431m)
Big Foot Hills (67.5km/707m)
Three Sisters (47.8km/879m)
Achterbahn (47.4km/973m)
The PRL Half (69km/954m)
Quatch Quest (45.9km/1683m)
The Pretzel (72.2km/1333m)
Volcano Circuit (25 laps)(105.3km/530m)
Four Horsemen (89.3km/2112m)

name: Stage 4 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!


Stage 4
Route: Sand and Sequoias
Date: April 6-12

Wrap up the Zwift Big Spin down on Sand and Sequoias, with loads of prizes still on deck!

name: Bikealicious Endurance & Espresso
description: Endurance & Espresso is a relaxed but purposeful Sunday morning Zwift ride (We have the "rubber-band" activated, which allows you to ride at your own pace, slow or fast, and you are guaranteed to stay in the group), focused on steady endurance and good vibes. We’ll roll at a conversational pace, settle into aerobic zones, and shake out the legs while easing into the day—perfect for building fitness without burying yourself. All abilities welcome, and coffee talk strongly approved ☕🚴‍♂️.

eventSubgroups.name: Bikealicious Endurance & Espresso (E)

All abilities welcome, and coffee talk strongly approved ☕🚴‍♂️.

name: Stanga Sunday Endurance
description:
Stanga Sunday Endurance is all about winter base miles in good company. Settle into Zone 2, find the bunch, and let the kilometres roll by as we build steady fitness together. Expect a smooth pace and good vibes only – perfect for stacking winter endurance or spinning the legs after a hard week.

Like this format? Join the Stanga Racing club on Zwift for our full weekly schedule of crits, punchy races, and endurance rides.

https://www.zwift.com/clubs/12f0e125-1fb8-4d78-8da2-b39efca4bffb/home

name: ZSUN Endurance Enhancer
description:
Get ready to boost your stamina in ZSUN’s Endurance Enhancer! This steady, longer-duration ride is perfect for building resilience and preparing for harder events or races.

Targeting a pace of 2.4–2.7 w/kg over ~120 minutes, it’s ideal for developing aerobic capacity while riding with a focused, supportive group.

🗓️
Sunday AM | 120 mins | ~2.4–2.7 w/kg

🎯
Focus on endurance development

🚴‍♀️
Suitable for mid to high-level social riders

🎁
Complete the ride to earn your ZSUN kit

Let’s push our limits together – one pedal stroke at a time!

name: PACK Run: Smile for Miles
description:
PACK Run Smile for Miles is the answer to how to start your Sunday the right way. We will usually run one lap of a short route and then offer an after party for whatever distance you desire. Come for the banter, the confections, and smiles and leave with a sense of accomplishment and community. https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftpack/
#StrongerTogether #MaythePackBewithYou

name: PAOLO BARBERA & SCANNELLATORI SERIALI WORKOUT
description:
"Scannellatori Seriali" is a large community of cyclists, triathletes, and runners. We invite you to join our community by following our Instagram page at https://www.instagram.com/scannellatori_seriali/ or contacting us on Facebook.
 
Coach Paolo Barbera (Please visit www.heycoach.it )   is a Certified Triathlon and Ironman Coach and the founder of Active Kids, a sporting clinic to help children and adults in the prevention and treatment of obesity through healty nutrition and tailored training programs

Paolo is an experienced thriathlete and cyclist, in 2017 opened an endurance training center in milan, Tri60, specilized in indoor training.

In the last ten years Paolo has developed training programs for triathletes, runners and cyclists. Indoor training plays a key role to control pace, cadence and mental strenght.

Paolo’s workouts are designed to mix different training zones aiming to maximize results in a very short time. Paolo’s coachees by following his workouts, at the right intensity, have achieved challenging results.

name: Het is Koers in the Dutch mountains
description:
Het is Koers, the famous Dutch cycling blog presents you a variety of social rides. At Sunday morning we go "in the Dutch Mountains"
Between 1st Sunday of October until the last Sunday of March, we will offer you a medium paced endurance ride with social characteristics.
Meaning a ride leader will guide you through the hills and mountains that Zwift has to offer. All riders are encouraged to keep the bunch together, so we can start and finish as one happy blob.
On the flats we will ride about 2.5 w/kg and on the climbs around 3.0 w/kg reflecting a C-category ride.

Between 1st Sunday of April until last Sunday of September HIK presents you with a variety of free rides (no lead) through the Dutch mountains. On weekly basis you can ride with other C-category riders, wanting to ride uphill.
Check out our weekly ride announcements on the HIK Facebook https://www.facebook.com/groups/hetiskoers
Join Het Is Koers on Zwift https://www.zwift.com/clubs/HetIsKoers/home
Other HIK events:
Watts More! (C) 2.5-3.0 W/kg, Tuesday 19.00 CET
Something Different! (D) 2.2-2.3 W/kg, Thursday 19.15 CET
Weekend Starter! (D) 1.7-2.2 W/kg and (C) 2.3-2.8 W/kg, Friday 19.30 CET
Endurance Recovery! (C) 2.2-2.6 W/kg, Saturday 9.00 AM CET

name: ZU4R eSport Masochist Climber
description:
ZU4R Sportswear has the pleasure to invite you to the ZU4R eSport Masochist Climber series 2022. Here we will challenge, cheer on, support and put each other in competition, in a series of climbs up the Alpe du Zwift – Road to Sky.

In addition to the community, we have the following badges as objectives:
• Avid Climber: Climb the Alpe 5 times
• Masochist: Climb the Alpe 25 times
• Lift Off: Finish Alpe in under an hour
And of course - the climbing wheels: Lightweight Meilenstein, which you can get on the wheel of fortune at the top of AdZ. Collecting altitude meters for the Zwift Consept bike Z1 (Tron) bike can also be a goal for those who do not have this bike.

More information about ZU4R eSport: https://www.zu4resport.com
We use the Voice channel "Masochist Climber» at ZU4R eSport Discord-server: https://discord.gg/RMVde96aqb

Welcome – ride together – RIDE ON 👍

name: Watts More To the Top!
description:
Watts More! Ride with friends in challenging events. Take on your challenge in Watts, elevation or duration! 

At Sunday morning we go To the top! A rideleader will guide you through the hills and mountains that Zwift has to offer. On the flats we will ride about 2.5 w/kg and on the climbs around 3.0 w/kg reflecting a C-category ride. All riders are encouraged to keep the bunch together, so we can start and finish as one happy blob. During the season we build up the elevation meters. 

From October until March these rides are guided with a rideleader. From April until September the rides are without rideleader. In that case don’t argue, blob up and be nice.  
 
Check out our weekly ride announcements on the Watts More Facebook page https://www.facebook.com/groups/1151203888657006/?ref=share 

 Join Watts More on Zwift  https://www.zwift.com/clubs/d6afeaa7-e754-478a-b68d-2a794648fa02/home  

 
Other Watts More events: 
Build more Watts! (C) 2.5-3.0 W/kg, Tuesday 19.00 CET  
Different Watts! (D) 2.2-2.4 W/kg, Thursday 19.00 CET 
Rendurance! (C) 2.2-2.6 W/kg, Saturday 9.00 AM CET

name: Zwift Epic Race - Petit Boucle
description:
Join us as we take on some slightly more challenging race routes!

For more Epic Races, please join the club on the Companion App: https://www.zwift.com/clubs/a1ea0324-7f4a-46a7-8547-a7a3246e349b/home

All racers will start together, so make sure you're ready at the start!

WHAT IS ZWIFTPOWER? 
For further information on connecting to ZwiftPower, check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note: For your results to show up in ZwiftPower, you must use a heart rate monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter. 

Check out zwift.com/racing for more information on how you can participate in other events offered by Zwift and the community to have a great racing experience.

#zwiftofficial

name: Workout 1 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 1: Foundations
This workout reinforces “calm control” with mostly steady work, then finishes by sharpening leg speed so you can stay smooth at any cadence.

name: Workout 2: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp
description:
The Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp is where the pros put in the work, and this year, you’re invited to join them. Across five weeks of structured training, plus a make-up week, you’ll ride alongside the team on Zwift—sprinting with Jasper Philipsen and Kaden Groves, building endurance with Mathieu van der Poel, and learning from head coach Kristof De Kegel. Don't miss your chance to be a part of the structure, science, and team energy that fuels the WorldTour.

Workout 2: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp

Get ready for a power-focused session built around high-torque intervals and structured recovery. Each effort builds the strength you need for explosive moments, and every recovery helps you reset and go again. This is where raw power starts to show up!

name: Vikings Valhalla Sunday Skaal ride
description:
Welcome to the Vikings Valhalla Sunday Skaal ride. 

We would love to have you join us to toast a ride together to end the week. Our rides are very inclusive with a ‘’no one gets dropped’’ approach. We encourage riders to respect the leader's pace and ride with the yellow beacon. This is NOT A RACE! Stronger riders are encouraged to fall back and help sweep the riders struggling in the back. If you are looking for a fun ride with lots of Skaal this is the perfect ride for you.

Come and try us..

For more information about our rides go to: https://www.facebook.com/groups/503388660165279/

name: Norwegian Watts Club Endurance Ride
description:
Welcome to Norwegian Watts Endurance Ride
When it’s getting cold and wet outside, it’s time to get inside and get the hours in. Join us for a chill
and kind spirited century ride. You don’t have to stay for the whole ride, but all finishers will be
rewarded our awesome jersey.
The aim is to keep the group together, chatting and having
fun. This is a group ride, not a race!
Pace 1,7-2,0 w/kg
The ride leader will aim to ride mid parameters, but there might be slight variations above or below
the average during the ride.
NB: Please always respect

name: Stage 1: Pas Racing: Jungle Circuit
description:
The PAS Racing Gravel Series brings the spirit and style of Pas Normal Studios to gravel racing on Zwift. Across four stages, you’ll take on demanding routes in a series designed to be raced flat out. Get a shiny new gravel bike from the Drop Shop and let it rip!

Complete any stage to win a brand new Pas Normal Jersey!

Badges are out—XP is in. Every finish fuels your progress. Earn up to 2000 XP for completing the series, including a massive 1000 XP from Stage One.

Stage 1
Route: Jungle Circuit
Date: April 6–12

The series kicks off on the Jungle Circuit in Watopia.. Line up, find your rhythm, and open the PAS Racing Series strong.

Stage 2
Route: Handful of Gravel
Date: April 13–19

The challenge builds. Handful of Gravel rewards the right setup and steady power across demanding terrain. Upgrade your build, join the next start line, and keep the momentum rolling.

Stage 3
Route: Yumezi Grit
Date: April 20–26

A brand new gravel racing route on Zwift. Fresh terrain. New lines to chase. Take on Yumezi Grit, test yourself against the field, and experience competitive gravel at its best.

Stage 4
Route: Serpentine 8
Date: April 27 – May 3

One final chance to line up and close out the PAS Racing Series. Hard routes. Real racing. Finish it strong.

MONTHLY GC COMPETITION

Looking for extra motivation? The Monthly GC (General Classification) Competition lets you track your progress across all stages. Each race counts—your times add up throughout the series, shaping the overall standings. At the end of the month, the fastest total time takes the win!
VIEW RESULTS: https://www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/pasracing2026

—------------------

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that in order to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

name: SZR Groupworkouts by Aktivitus
description:
These WOs are designed to give you improved aerobic development and increased aerobic threshold (LT1) -endurance - in a 2h workout. To get most out of this session, make sure your FTP is correct set. If you are aerobic underdeveloped for cycling you may need to decrease your FTP-settings.

The workout is 120min and starts with a 15min warmup. First main block is 3x15min at a controlled threshold/Sweet spot (90% of FTP) on lower cadences to wear us down and to get a time effective local aerobic development and cycling strength (endurance).

The second block contains 20x30/60sek intervals. 30sec at 150% of FTP with a 1min active rest. This is highly anaerobic which gives us an improved lactic tolerance and an increased anaerobic stanima. However, in a worn-out state these intervals will also stress your aerobic development. That means you oxygen transport into your working muscles will get better. Your endurance will thereby increase.

This WO is designed Johan Hasselmark at Aktivitus (www.aktivitus.se). Aktivitus runs Swedens leading test and coaching operations for endurance sports.
Johan Hasselmark is an international level adventure racer and extreme triathlete with several wins, 30 years of competative experince in endurance sports and 8 years of coaching and physiological testing.

name: ZZRC Wacky Chase
description:
Welcome to ZZRC's Wacky Chase! 

Get ready to saddle up for an unforgettable adventure that combines pace, fun, and a dash of friendly competition! Our group rides are open to all riders, and we've constructed a delightful three-paced category to ensure everyone can enjoy a safe and top-notch experience on two wheels.

Here’s the game plan: we’ve divided our crew into three spirited teams. Team B will zoom at a snappy 3-3.5 pace, Team C will enjoy a smooth cruise at 2.5-3, while Team D will take it easy at 2-2.5. But wait, it gets even better! We’re throwing in a twist of excitement with a hot chase
. Team D takes off first from the pen, followed swiftly by Team C, and then... BANG! Team B sets off on the chase to catch both teams! 

This isn’t just another group ride; it’s your ticket to banter, camaraderie, and a good ol’ time! Our leaders will guide you, sharing pacing tips and tricks along the way. Remember, teamwork makes the dream work, so use that draft to your advantage as you barrel through the ride together!

A couple of quick housekeeping notes: we’re keeping the atmosphere all-inclusive and relaxed, with a focus on enjoyment rather than perfection. Sweeps and Ride Buddies will be off-duty this time, so if you find yourself lagging behind, feel free to continue at your own pace or buddy up with fellow riders nearby.

And hey, we’ve got a little rule: leave the TT Bikes at home! They don’t draft well and might make you puff and pant a bit more than you want. Mountain bikes? They’re welcome too, just be prepared to push a little harder than the folks on road bikes. No worries if you hit a snag; our 30-minute late join feature will let you teleport back to the main group with the magical YELLOW BEACON!

We’re all about chatting and having fun while we ride, so don’t miss out on our dedicated Discord channel! Join us, choose your pace, and get ready to share the laughs as we roll.

**Top Tips for Wacky Chase Success:**
1. Stick close to your ride leader; don’t let that gap turn into a canyon!
2. Avoid the fence—we want you in one piece, not fried!
3. Most importantly... HAVE FUN! This is all about the adventure. 

Don’t forget to connect with us on our ZZRC Facebook page and join the club on the companion app for all the latest gossip and rides!

So get your cycling gear on , bring your best vibes, and let’s hit the Zwift Roads together! 

Discord Channel
https://discord.com/channels/1009379476041383946/1009388181269004289
